 `./haklex/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawDisplayRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useColorScheme } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     2→import { presentDialog } from '@haklex/rich-editor-ui'
     3→import { usePortalTheme } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
     4→import { Maximize2, ScanSearch, X, ZoomIn, ZoomOut } from 'lucide-react'
     5→import { Component, type FC, type ReactNode } from 'react'
     6→import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     7→
     8→import * as css from './styles.css'
     9→import { useTldrawData } from './useTldrawData'
    10→
    11→export interface TldrawStaticRendererProps {
    12→  snapshot: string
    13→}
    14→
    15→export const TldrawDisplayRenderer: FC<TldrawStaticRendererProps> = ({
    16→  snapshot,
    17→}) => {
    18→  const theme = useColorScheme()
    19→  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
    20→  const [hasEnteredView, setHasEnteredView] = useState(false)
    21→
    22→  useEffect(() => {
    23→    if (hasEnteredView) return
    24→    const target = containerRef.current
    25→    if (!target) return
    26→
    27→    const observer = new IntersectionObserver(
    28→      (entries) => {
    29→        if (entries.some((e) => e.isIntersecting)) {
    30→          setHasEnteredView(true)
    31→          observer.disconnect()
    32→        }
    33→      },
    34→      { rootMargin: '200px 0px', threshold: 0.1 },
    35→    )
    36→    observer.observe(target)
    37→    return () => observer.disconnect()
    38→  }, [hasEnteredView])
    39→
    40→  if (!hasEnteredView) {
    41→    return (
    42→      <div ref={containerRef} className={css.tldrawStaticContainer}>
    43→        <div className={css.tldrawLoading}>Loading tldraw...</div>
    44→      </div>
    45→    )
    46→  }
    47→
    48→  return (
    49→    <div ref={containerRef}>
    50→      <TldrawStaticCanvas snapshot={snapshot} theme={theme} />
    51→    </div>
    52→  )
    53→}
    54→
    55→// --- Fullscreen readonly content ---
    56→
    57→const TldrawExpandContent: FC<{
    58→  dismiss: () => void
    59→  TldrawComponent: FC<any>
    60→  data: Record<string, any>
    61→  theme: 'light' | 'dark'
    62→}> = ({ dismiss, TldrawComponent, data, theme }) => (
    63→  <>
    64→    <div className={css.tldrawDialogHeader}>
    65→      <span className={css.tldrawDialogTitle}>Whiteboard</span>
    66→      <span className={css.tldrawDialogMeta}>tldraw</span>
    67→      <button type="button" className={css.tldrawHeaderClose} onClick={dismiss}>
    68→        <X size={18} />
    69→      </button>
    70→    </div>
    71→    <div className={css.tldrawDialogCanvas}>
    72→      <TldrawComponent
    73→        snapshot={data}
    74→        hideUi
    75→        onMount={(editor: any) => {
    76→          editor.updateInstanceState({ isReadonly: true })
    77→          editor.setCurrentTool('hand')
    78→          editor.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme: theme })
    79→          setTimeout(() => editor.zoomToFit({ animate: false }), 100)
    80→        }}
    81→      />
    82→    </div>
    83→  </>
    84→)
    85→
    86→// --- Main Canvas ---
    87→
    88→const TldrawStaticCanvas: FC<{
    89→  snapshot: string
    90→  theme: 'light' | 'dark'
    91→}> = ({ snapshot, theme }) => {
    92→  const {
    93→    snapshot: data,
    94→    loading: dataLoading,
    95→    error: dataError,
    96→  } = useTldrawData(snapshot)
    97→  const [TldrawComponent, setTldrawComponent] = useState<FC<any> | null>(null)
    98→  const [libLoading, setLibLoading] = useState(true)
    99→  const editorRef = useRef<any>(null)
   100→  const { className: portalClassName } = usePortalTheme()
   101→
   102→  useEffect(() => {
   103→    import('tldraw')
   104→      .then((mod) => {
   105→        setTldrawComponent(() => mod.Tldraw)
   106→        setLibLoading(false)
   107→      })
   108→      .catch(() => setLibLoading(false))
   109→  }, [])
   110→
   111→  useEffect(() => {
   112→    if (editorRef.current?.user?.updateUserPreferences) {
   113→      editorRef.current.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme: theme })
   114→    }
   115→  }, [theme])
   116→
   117→  const handleMount = useCallback(
   118→    (editor: any) => {
   119→      editorRef.current = editor
   120→      editor.updateInstanceState({ isReadonly: true })
   121→      editor.setCurrentTool('hand')
   122→      editor.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme: theme })
   123→      setTimeout(() => {
   124→        editor.zoomToFit({ animate: false })
   125→      }, 100)
   126→    },
   127→    [theme],
   128→  )
   129→
   130→  const handleExpand = useCallback(() => {
   131→    if (!TldrawComponent || !data) return
   132→    presentDialog({
   133→      content: ({ dismiss }) => (
   134→        <TldrawExpandContent
   135→          dismiss={dismiss}
   136→          TldrawComponent={TldrawComponent}
   137→          data={data}
   138→          theme={theme}
   139→        />
   140→      ),
   141→      className: css.tldrawFullscreenPopup,
   142→      portalClassName,
   143→      theme,
   144→      showCloseButton: false,
   145→      clickOutsideToDismiss: true,
   146→    })
   147→  }, [TldrawComponent, data, theme, portalClassName])
   148→
   149→  const loading = dataLoading || libLoading
   150→
   151→  if (loading) {
   152→    return (
   153→      <div className={css.tldrawStaticContainer}>
   154→        <div className={css.tldrawLoading}>Loading tldraw...</div>
   155→      </div>
   156→    )
   157→  }
   158→
   159→  if (dataError || !data) {
   160→    return (
   161→      <div className={css.tldrawStaticContainer}>
   162→        <div className={css.tldrawError}>{dataError || 'No data'}</div>
   163→      </div>
   164→    )
   165→  }
   166→
   167→  if (!TldrawComponent) {
   168→    return (
   169→      <div className={css.tldrawStaticContainer}>
   170→        <div className={css.tldrawError}>Failed to load tldraw</div>
   171→      </div>
   172→    )
   173→  }
   174→
   175→  return (
   176→    <div
   177→      className={css.tldrawStaticContainer}
   178→      data-theme={theme}
   179→      data-color-scheme={theme}
   180→      suppressHydrationWarning
   181→    >
   182→      <TldrawErrorBoundary
   183→        fallback={
   184→          <div className={css.tldrawError}>Failed to render tldraw</div>
   185→        }
   186→      >
   187→        <TldrawComponent snapshot={data} hideUi onMount={handleMount} />
   188→      </TldrawErrorBoundary>
   189→
   190→      <div className={css.tldrawActionGroup}>
   191→        <button
   192→          type="button"
   193→          className={css.tldrawActionButton}
   194→          title="Zoom In"
   195→          onClick={() => editorRef.current?.zoomIn()}
   196→        >
   197→          <ZoomIn size={20} />
   198→        </button>
   199→        <button
   200→          type="button"
   201→          className={css.tldrawActionButton}
   202→          title="Zoom Out"
   203→          onClick={() => editorRef.current?.zoomOut()}
   204→        >
   205→          <ZoomOut size={20} />
   206→        </button>
   207→        <button
   208→          type="button"
   209→          className={css.tldrawActionButton}
   210→          title="Fit to Content"
   211→          onClick={() => editorRef.current?.zoomToFit()}
   212→        >
   213→          <ScanSearch size={20} />
   214→        </button>
   215→        <button
   216→          type="button"
   217→          className={css.tldrawActionButton}
   218→          title="Expand"
   219→          onClick={handleExpand}
   220→        >
   221→          <Maximize2 size={20} />
   222→        </button>
   223→      </div>
   224→    </div>
   225→  )
   226→}
   227→
   228→class TldrawErrorBoundary extends Component<
   229→  { fallback: ReactNode; children: ReactNode },
   230→  { hasError: boolean }
   231→> {
   232→  state = { hasError: false }
   233→  static getDerivedStateFromError() {
   234→    return { hasError: true }
   235→  }
   236→  render() {
   237→    return this.state.hasError ? this.props.fallback : this.props.children
   238→  }
   239→}
   240→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 2026-03-02 11:09:26Z)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./haklex/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawSSRRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import type { FC } from 'react'
     2→
     3→export interface TldrawSSRRendererProps {
     4→  snapshot: string
     5→}
     6→
     7→export const TldrawSSRRenderer: FC<TldrawSSRRendererProps> = ({ snapshot }) => {
     8→  let label = 'Tldraw Whiteboard'
     9→  try {
    10→    const data = JSON.parse(snapshot)
    11→    if (data && typeof data === 'object') {
    12→      const shapeCount = Object.keys(data).filter((k) =>
    13→        k.startsWith('shape:'),
    14→      ).length
    15→      if (shapeCount > 0) {
    16→        label = `Tldraw Whiteboard (${shapeCount} shapes)`
    17→      }
    18→    }
    19→  } catch {
    20→    // snapshot might be a URL ref or invalid JSON — show generic placeholder
    21→  }
    22→
    23→  return (
    24→    <div
    25→      className="rich-tldraw-ssr-placeholder"
    26→      style={{
    27→        position: 'relative',
    28→        width: '100%',
    29→        aspectRatio: '16 / 10',
    30→        display: 'flex',
    31→        alignItems: 'center',
    32→        justifyContent: 'center',
    33→        backgroundColor: 'var(--rich-tldraw-bg, #f5f5f5)',
    34→        borderRadius: '8px',
    35→        border: '1px solid var(--rich-tldraw-border, #e5e5e5)',
    36→        color: 'var(--rich-tldraw-fg, #737373)',
    37→        fontSize: '14px',
    38→      }}
    39→      aria-label={label}
    40→    >
    41→      <span>{label}</span>
    42→    </div>
    43→  )
    44→}
    45→
```
</details></tool-use>

     1→import type { SlashMenuItemConfig } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     2→import type { EditorConfig, LexicalEditor, LexicalNode, NodeKey } from 'lexical'
     3→import { $getNodeByKey, $insertNodes } from 'lexical'
     4→import { PenTool } from 'lucide-react'
     5→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
     6→import { createElement, lazy, Suspense } from 'react'
     7→
     8→import { type SerializedTldrawNode, TldrawNode } from './TldrawNode'
     9→
    10→const LazyDisplayRenderer = lazy(() =>
    11→  import('./TldrawDisplayRenderer').then((m) => ({
    12→    default: m.TldrawDisplayRenderer,
    13→  })),
    14→)
    15→const LazyEditRenderer = lazy(() =>
    16→  import('./TldrawEditRenderer').then((m) => ({
    17→    default: m.TldrawEditRenderer,
    18→  })),
    19→)
    20→
    21→export class TldrawEditNode extends TldrawNode {
    22→  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    23→    {
    24→      title: 'Whiteboard',
    25→      icon: createElement(PenTool, { size: 20 }),
    26→      description: 'Tldraw whiteboard canvas',
    27→      keywords: ['tldraw', 'whiteboard', 'draw', 'canvas'],
    28→      section: 'MEDIA',
    29→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    30→        editor.update(() => {
    31→          $insertNodes([$createTldrawEditNode('{}')])
    32→        })
    33→      },
    34→    },
    35→  ]
    36→
    37→  static clone(node: TldrawEditNode): TldrawEditNode {
    38→    return new TldrawEditNode(node.__snapshot, node.__key)
    39→  }
    40→
    41→  constructor(snapshot: string, key?: NodeKey) {
    42→    super(snapshot, key)
    43→  }
    44→
    45→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedTldrawNode): TldrawEditNode {
    46→    return new TldrawEditNode(serializedNode.snapshot)
    47→  }
    48→
    49→  decorate(editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    50→    const nodeKey = this.__key
    51→    const isEditable = editor.isEditable()
    52→
    53→    const fallback = createElement('div', {
    54→      className: 'rich-tldraw-loading',
    55→      style: {
    56→        position: 'relative',
    57→        width: '100%',
    58→        aspectRatio: '16 / 10',
    59→        margin: '1rem 0',
    60→      },
    61→    })
    62→
    63→    if (isEditable) {
    64→      return createElement(
    65→        Suspense,
    66→        { fallback },
    67→        createElement(LazyEditRenderer, {
    68→          snapshot: this.__snapshot,
    69→          onSnapshotChange: (newSnapshot: string) => {
    70→            editor.update(() => {
    71→              const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey) as TldrawNode | null
    72→              if (node) {
    73→                node.setSnapshot(newSnapshot)
    74→              }
    75→            })
    76→          },
    77→        }),
    78→      )
    79→    }
    80→
    81→    return createElement(
    82→      Suspense,
    83→      { fallback },
    84→      createElement(LazyDisplayRenderer, { snapshot: this.__snapshot }),
    85→    )
    86→  }
    87→}
    88→
    89→export function $createTldrawEditNode(snapshot: string): TldrawEditNode {
    90→  return new TldrawEditNode(snapshot)
    91→}
    92→
    93→export function $isTldrawEditNode(
    94→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
    95→): node is TldrawEditNode {
    96→  return node instanceof TldrawEditNode
    97→}
    98→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./haklex/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawEditRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useColorScheme } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     2→import { presentDialog, SegmentedControl } from '@haklex/rich-editor-ui'
     3→import { usePortalTheme } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
     4→import { Clipboard, Download, Pencil, Upload, X } from 'lucide-react'
     5→import type { FC } from 'react'
     6→import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     7→
     8→import * as css from './styles.css'
     9→import { useTldrawConfig } from './TldrawConfigContext'
    10→import { useTldrawData } from './useTldrawData'
    11→
    12→export interface TldrawEditRendererProps {
    13→  snapshot: string
    14→  onSnapshotChange: (snapshot: string) => void
    15→}
    16→
    17→const SAVE_DEBOUNCE_MS = 2000
    18→
    19→// ── Dialog content (fullscreen editor) ──────────────────────────
    20→
    21→const TldrawEditorDialogContent: FC<{
    22→  dismiss: () => void
    23→  TldrawComponent: FC<any>
    24→  initialData: Record<string, any> | undefined
    25→  initialSnapshot: string
    26→  theme: 'light' | 'dark'
    27→  onSave: (ref: string) => void
    28→  saveSnapshot?: (snapshot: object) => Promise<string>
    29→  onClose: (doc?: Record<string, any>) => void
    30→}> = ({
    31→  dismiss,
    32→  TldrawComponent,
    33→  initialData,
    34→  initialSnapshot,
    35→  theme,
    36→  onSave,
    37→  saveSnapshot,
    38→  onClose,
    39→}) => {
    40→  const { className: portalClassName } = usePortalTheme()
    41→  const editorRef = useRef<any>(null)
    42→  const saveTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined)
    43→  const [isDirty, setIsDirty] = useState(false)
    44→  const isDirtyRef = useRef(false)
    45→  const [storageMode, setStorageMode] = useState<'inline' | 'remote'>(() => {
    46→    if (!saveSnapshot || !initialSnapshot || !initialSnapshot.trim())
    47→      return 'inline'
    48→    try {
    49→      JSON.parse(initialSnapshot)
    50→      return 'inline'
    51→    } catch {
    52→      return 'remote'
    53→    }
    54→  })
    55→  const storageModeRef = useRef(storageMode)
    56→  const [savedRef, setSavedRef] = useState(() => {
    57→    if (!saveSnapshot || !initialSnapshot || !initialSnapshot.trim()) return ''
    58→    try {
    59→      JSON.parse(initialSnapshot)
    60→      return ''
    61→    } catch {
    62→      return initialSnapshot
    63→    }
    64→  })
    65→  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false)
    66→
    67→  useEffect(() => {
    68→    return () => {
    69→      if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
    70→    }
    71→  }, [])
    72→
    73→  const performSave = useCallback((): Promise<void> => {
    74→    if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
    75→    const editor = editorRef.current
    76→    if (!editor) return Promise.resolve()
    77→    try {
    78→      const doc = editor.store.getSnapshot()
    79→      if (storageModeRef.current === 'remote' && saveSnapshot) {
    80→        setIsSaving(true)
    81→        return saveSnapshot(doc).then(
    82→          (ref) => {
    83→            onSave(ref)
    84→            isDirtyRef.current = false
    85→            setIsDirty(false)
    86→            setIsSaving(false)
    87→            setSavedRef(ref)
    88→          },
    89→          () => {
    90→            setIsSaving(false)
    91→          },
    92→        )
    93→      } else {
    94→        onSave(JSON.stringify(doc))
    95→        isDirtyRef.current = false
    96→        setIsDirty(false)
    97→      }
    98→    } catch {
    99→      // ignore
   100→    }
   101→    return Promise.resolve()
   102→  }, [onSave, saveSnapshot])
   103→
   104→  const handleMount = useCallback(
   105→    (editor: any) => {
   106→      editorRef.current = editor
   107→      editor.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme: theme })
   108→      editor.store.listen(
   109→        () => {
   110→          isDirtyRef.current = true
   111→          setIsDirty(true)
   112→          if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
   113→          saveTimerRef.current = setTimeout(
   114→            () => performSave(),
   115→            SAVE_DEBOUNCE_MS,
   116→          )
   117→        },
   118→        { scope: 'document' },
   119→      )
   120→    },
   121→    [theme, performSave],
   122→  )
   123→
   124→  const handleSaveAndClose = useCallback(() => {
   125→    void performSave().then(() => {
   126→      const editor = editorRef.current
   127→      onClose(editor?.store.getSnapshot())
   128→      dismiss()
   129→    })
   130→  }, [performSave, onClose, dismiss])
   131→
   132→  const handleDiscard = useCallback(() => {
   133→    if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
   134→    dismiss()
   135→  }, [dismiss])
   136→
   137→  const showConfirmDialog = useCallback(() => {
   138→    presentDialog({
   139→      title: 'Unsaved Changes',
   140→      description:
   141→        'You have unsaved changes that will be lost if you close now.',
   142→      content: ({ dismiss: dismissConfirm }) => (
   143→        <div className={css.tldrawConfirmActions}>
   144→          <button
   145→            type="button"
   146→            className={css.tldrawConfirmBtn}
   147→            onClick={dismissConfirm}
   148→          >
   149→            Continue Editing
   150→          </button>
   151→          <button
   152→            type="button"
   153→            className={css.tldrawConfirmBtnDanger}
   154→            onClick={() => {
   155→              dismissConfirm()
   156→              handleDiscard()
   157→            }}
   158→          >
   159→            Discard
   160→          </button>
   161→          <button
   162→            type="button"
   163→            className={css.tldrawConfirmBtnPrimary}
   164→            onClick={() => {
   165→              dismissConfirm()
   166→              handleSaveAndClose()
   167→            }}
   168→          >
   169→            Save & Close
   170→          </button>
   171→        </div>
   172→      ),
   173→      portalClassName,
   174→      theme,
   175→      showCloseButton: false,
   176→      clickOutsideToDismiss: false,
   177→    })
   178→  }, [handleDiscard, handleSaveAndClose, portalClassName, theme])
   179→
   180→  // Intercept ESC in capture phase to prevent Base UI auto-dismiss
   181→  useEffect(() => {
   182→    const handleKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
   183→      if (e.key === 'Escape') {
   184→        e.preventDefault()
   185→        e.stopImmediatePropagation()
   186→        if (isDirtyRef.current) {
   187→          showConfirmDialog()
   188→        } else {
   189→          dismiss()
   190→        }
   191→      }
   192→    }
   193→    document.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown, true)
   194→    return () => document.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown, true)
   195→  }, [dismiss, showConfirmDialog])
   196→
   197→  const attemptClose = useCallback(() => {
   198→    if (isDirtyRef.current) {
   199→      showConfirmDialog()
   200→    } else {
   201→      dismiss()
   202→    }
   203→  }, [dismiss, showConfirmDialog])
   204→
   205→  const handleManualUpload = useCallback(() => {
   206→    performSave()
   207→  }, [performSave])
   208→
   209→  const handleExportJson = useCallback(() => {
   210→    const editor = editorRef.current
   211→    if (!editor) return
   212→    const doc = editor.store.getSnapshot()
   213→    const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(doc, null, 2)], {
   214→      type: 'application/json',
   215→    })
   216→    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob)
   217→    const a = document.createElement('a')
   218→    a.href = url
   219→    a.download = 'tldraw-snapshot.json'
   220→    a.click()
   221→    URL.revokeObjectURL(url)
   222→  }, [])
   223→
   224→  const handleCopyJson = useCallback(() => {
   225→    const editor = editorRef.current
   226→    if (!editor) return
   227→    const doc = editor.store.getSnapshot()
   228→    void navigator.clipboard.writeText(JSON.stringify(doc))
   229→  }, [])
   230→
   231→  const handleCopyRef = useCallback(() => {
   232→    if (savedRef) void navigator.clipboard.writeText(savedRef)
   233→  }, [savedRef])
   234→
   235→  const handleStorageModeChange = useCallback(
   236→    (newMode: 'inline' | 'remote') => {
   237→      setStorageMode(newMode)
   238→      storageModeRef.current = newMode
   239→      if (newMode === 'inline') setSavedRef('')
   240→      performSave()
   241→    },
   242→    [performSave],
   243→  )
   244→
   245→  return (
   246→    <>
   247→      {/* Header */}
   248→      <div className={css.tldrawDialogHeader}>
   249→        <span
   250→          className={css.tldrawStatusDot}
   251→          style={{ backgroundColor: isDirty ? '#f59e0b' : '#22c55e' }}
   252→        />
   253→        <span className={css.tldrawDialogTitle}>Canvas Editor</span>
   254→        <span className={css.tldrawDialogMeta}>tldraw</span>
   255→
   256→        <div className={css.tldrawHeaderActions}>
   257→          {saveSnapshot && (
   258→            <>
   259→              <SegmentedControl
   260→                items={[
   261→                  { value: 'inline', label: 'Inline' },
   262→                  { value: 'remote', label: 'Remote' },
   263→                ]}
   264→                value={storageMode}
   265→                onChange={handleStorageModeChange}
   266→              />
   267→              <div className={css.tldrawActionBarSep} />
   268→              <button
   269→                type="button"
   270→                className={css.tldrawActionBarBtn}
   271→                onClick={handleManualUpload}
   272→                disabled={isSaving}
   273→              >
   274→                <Upload size={14} />
   275→                <span>{isSaving ? 'Saving...' : 'Save'}</span>
   276→              </button>
   277→              <div className={css.tldrawActionBarSep} />
   278→            </>
   279→          )}
   280→          <button
   281→            type="button"
   282→            className={css.tldrawActionBarBtn}
   283→            onClick={handleExportJson}
   284→          >
   285→            <Download size={14} />
   286→            JSON
   287→          </button>
   288→          <button
   289→            type="button"
   290→            className={css.tldrawActionBarBtn}
   291→            onClick={handleCopyJson}
   292→          >
   293→            <Clipboard size={14} />
   294→            Copy
   295→          </button>
   296→          {storageMode === 'remote' && savedRef && (
   297→            <>
   298→              <div className={css.tldrawActionBarSep} />
   299→              <button
   300→                type="button"
   301→                className={css.tldrawActionBarUrl}
   302→                onClick={handleCopyRef}
   303→                title={savedRef}
   304→              >
   305→                {savedRef}
   306→              </button>
   307→            </>
   308→          )}
   309→        </div>
   310→
   311→        <button
   312→          type="button"
   313→          className={css.tldrawHeaderClose}
   314→          onClick={attemptClose}
   315→        >
   316→          <X size={18} />
   317→        </button>
   318→      </div>
   319→
   320→      {/* Canvas */}
   321→      <div className={css.tldrawDialogCanvas}>
   322→        <TldrawComponent snapshot={initialData} onMount={handleMount} />
   323→      </div>
   324→    </>
   325→  )
   326→}
   327→
   328→// ── Main component ──────────────────────────────────────────────
   329→
   330→export const TldrawEditRenderer: FC<TldrawEditRendererProps> = ({
   331→  snapshot,
   332→  onSnapshotChange,
   333→}) => {
   334→  const theme = useColorScheme()
   335→  const { saveSnapshot } = useTldrawConfig()
   336→  const {
   337→    snapshot: initialData,
   338→    loading: dataLoading,
   339→    error: dataError,
   340→  } = useTldrawData(snapshot)
   341→  const [TldrawComponent, setTldrawComponent] = useState<FC<any> | null>(null)
   342→  const [libLoading, setLibLoading] = useState(true)
   343→  const previewEditorRef = useRef<any>(null)
   344→  const initialDataRef = useRef<Record<string, any> | undefined>(undefined)
   345→  const onSnapshotChangeRef = useRef(onSnapshotChange)
   346→  onSnapshotChangeRef.current = onSnapshotChange
   347→  const saveSnapshotRef = useRef(saveSnapshot)
   348→  saveSnapshotRef.current = saveSnapshot
   349→  const snapshotRef = useRef(snapshot)
   350→  snapshotRef.current = snapshot
   351→  const { className: portalClassName } = usePortalTheme()
   352→
   353→  useEffect(() => {
   354→    if (initialData && !initialDataRef.current) {
   355→      initialDataRef.current = initialData
   356→    }
   357→  }, [initialData])
   358→
   359→  useEffect(() => {
   360→    import('tldraw')
   361→      .then((mod) => {
   362→        setTldrawComponent(() => mod.Tldraw)
   363→        setLibLoading(false)
   364→      })
   365→      .catch(() => setLibLoading(false))
   366→  }, [])
   367→
   368→  useEffect(() => {
   369→    if (previewEditorRef.current?.user?.updateUserPreferences) {
   370→      previewEditorRef.current.user.updateUserPreferences({
   371→        colorScheme: theme,
   372→      })
   373→    }
   374→  }, [theme])
   375→
   376→  const handlePreviewMount = useCallback(
   377→    (editor: any) => {
   378→      previewEditorRef.current = editor
   379→      editor.updateInstanceState({ isReadonly: true })
   380→      editor.setCurrentTool('hand')
   381→      editor.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme: theme })
   382→      setTimeout(() => editor.zoomToFit({ animate: false }), 100)
   383→    },
   384→    [theme],
   385→  )
   386→
   387→  const handleOpenEditor = useCallback(() => {
   388→    if (!TldrawComponent) return
   389→    presentDialog({
   390→      content: ({ dismiss }) => (
   391→        <TldrawEditorDialogContent
   392→          dismiss={dismiss}
   393→          TldrawComponent={TldrawComponent}
   394→          initialData={initialDataRef.current}
   395→          initialSnapshot={snapshotRef.current}
   396→          theme={theme}
   397→          onSave={(ref) => onSnapshotChangeRef.current(ref)}
   398→          saveSnapshot={saveSnapshotRef.current}
   399→          onClose={(doc) => {
   400→            if (doc) initialDataRef.current = doc
   401→          }}
   402→        />
   403→      ),
   404→      className: css.tldrawFullscreenPopup,
   405→      portalClassName,
   406→      theme,
   407→      showCloseButton: false,
   408→      clickOutsideToDismiss: false,
   409→    })
   410→  }, [TldrawComponent, theme, portalClassName])
   411→
   412→  const loading = dataLoading || libLoading
   413→
   414→  if (loading || !TldrawComponent) {
   415→    return (
   416→      <div className={css.tldrawEditorContainer}>
   417→        <div className={css.tldrawLoading}>Loading tldraw editor...</div>
   418→      </div>
   419→    )
   420→  }
   421→
   422→  if (dataError) {
   423→    return (
   424→      <div className={css.tldrawEditorContainer}>
   425→        <div className={css.tldrawError}>{dataError}</div>
   426→      </div>
   427→    )
   428→  }
   429→
   430→  return (
   431→    <div className={css.tldrawEditorContainer}>
   432→      <TldrawComponent
   433→        snapshot={initialDataRef.current}
   434→        hideUi
   435→        onMount={handlePreviewMount}
   436→      />
   437→
   438→      <button
   439→        type="button"
   440→        className={css.tldrawEditOverlay}
   441→        onClick={handleOpenEditor}
   442→      >
   443→        <span className={css.tldrawEditLabel}>
   444→          <Pencil size={16} />
   445→          Edit Whiteboard
   446→        </span>
   447→      </button>
   448→    </div>
   449→  )
   450→}
   451→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
     2→import { createContext, use, useMemo } from 'react'
     3→
     4→export interface TldrawConfig {
     5→  apiUrl?: string
     6→  saveSnapshot?: (snapshot: object) => Promise<string>
     7→}
     8→
     9→const TldrawConfigContext = createContext<TldrawConfig>({})
    10→
    11→export function TldrawConfigProvider({
    12→  apiUrl,
    13→  saveSnapshot,
    14→  children,
    15→}: TldrawConfig & { children: ReactNode }) {
    16→  const value = useMemo(
    17→    () => ({ apiUrl, saveSnapshot }),
    18→    [apiUrl, saveSnapshot],
    19→  )
    20→  return (
    21→    <TldrawConfigContext.Provider value={value}>
    22→      {children}
    23→    </TldrawConfigContext.Provider>
    24→  )
    25→}
    26→
    27→export function useTldrawConfig(): TldrawConfig {
    28→  return use(TldrawConfigContext)
    29→}
    30→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./haklex/rich-ext-tldraw/src/useTldrawData.ts`

```text
     1→import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import { useTldrawConfig } from './TldrawConfigContext'
     4→
     5→interface TldrawDataState {
     6→  snapshot: Record<string, any> | undefined
     7→  loading: boolean
     8→  error: string
     9→}
    10→
    11→export function useTldrawData(data: string): TldrawDataState {
    12→  const { apiUrl } = useTldrawConfig()
    13→
    14→  const parsed = useMemo(() => {
    15→    if (!data) return { type: 'empty' as const }
    16→
    17→    try {
    18→      const json = JSON.parse(data)
    19→      if (json && typeof json === 'object') {
    20→        return {
    21→          type: 'inline' as const,
    22→          snapshot: json as Record<string, any>,
    23→        }
    24→      }
    25→    } catch {
    26→      // not JSON
    27→    }
    28→
    29→    const firstLine = data.split('\n')[0].trim()
    30→    let fetchUrl: string | undefined
    31→
    32→    if (firstLine.startsWith('http')) {
    33→      fetchUrl = firstLine
    34→    } else if (firstLine.startsWith('ref:') && apiUrl) {
    35→      fetchUrl = `${apiUrl}/objects/${firstLine.slice(4)}`
    36→    }
    37→
    38→    if (fetchUrl) {
    39→      return { type: 'remote' as const, fetchUrl }
    40→    }
    41→
    42→    return {
    43→      type: 'error' as const,
    44→      error: firstLine.startsWith('ref:')
    45→        ? 'Missing apiUrl for ref resolution'
    46→        : 'Unrecognized snapshot format',
    47→    }
    48→  }, [data, apiUrl])
    49→
    50→  const fetchUrl = parsed.type === 'remote' ? parsed.fetchUrl : undefined
    51→
    52→  const [remoteSnapshot, setRemoteSnapshot] = useState<
    53→    Record<string, any> | undefined
    54→  >()
    55→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(!!fetchUrl)
    56→  const [error, setError] = useState('')
    57→
    58→  useEffect(() => {
    59→    if (!fetchUrl) return
    60→
    61→    let cancelled = false
    62→    setLoading(true)
    63→    setError('')
    64→
    65→    fetch(fetchUrl)
    66→      .then((res) => {
    67→        if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`)
    68→        return res.json()
    69→      })
    70→      .then((json) => {
    71→        if (!cancelled) {
    72→          setRemoteSnapshot(json)
    73→          setLoading(false)
    74→        }
    75→      })
    76→      .catch((err) => {
    77→        if (!cancelled) {
    78→          setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to load')
    79→          setLoading(false)
    80→        }
    81→      })
    82→
    83→    return () => {
    84→      cancelled = true
    85→    }
    86→  }, [fetchUrl])
    87→
    88→  if (parsed.type === 'inline') {
    89→    return { snapshot: parsed.snapshot, loading: false, error: '' }
    90→  }
    91→
    92→  if (parsed.type === 'remote') {
    93→    return { snapshot: remoteSnapshot, loading, error }
    94→  }
    95→
    96→  if (parsed.type === 'error') {
    97→    return { snapshot: undefined, loading: false, error: parsed.error }
    98→  }
    99→
   100→  return { snapshot: undefined, loading: false, error: '' }
   101→}
   102→
```
</details></tool-use>

 `./haklex/rich-ext-tldraw/README.md`

```text
     1→# @haklex/rich-ext-tldraw
     2→
     3→Tldraw 白板扩展。
     4→
     5→## 安装
     6→
     7→```bash
     8→pnpm add @haklex/rich-ext-tldraw @haklex/rich-editor tldraw
     9→```
    10→
    11→## 导出
    12→
    13→```ts
    14→// 节点
    15→export { TldrawNode } from './TldrawNode'
    16→export { $createTldrawNode, $isTldrawNode } from './TldrawNode'
    17→export type { SerializedTldrawNode } from './TldrawNode'
    18→
    19→// 插件
    20→export { TldrawPlugin, INSERT_TLDRAW_COMMAND } from './TldrawPlugin'
    21→
    22→// 渲染器
    23→export { TldrawStaticRenderer } from './TldrawStaticRenderer'
    24→export type { TldrawStaticRendererProps } from './TldrawStaticRenderer'
    25→export { TldrawEditRenderer } from './TldrawEditRenderer'
    26→export type { TldrawEditRendererProps } from './TldrawEditRenderer'
    27→
    28→// 上下文
    29→export { TldrawConfigProvider, useTldrawConfig } from './TldrawConfigContext'
    30→export type { TldrawConfig } from './TldrawConfigContext'
    31→
    32→// 向后兼容
    33→export { TldrawStaticRenderer as TldrawRenderer } from './TldrawStaticRenderer'
    34→export type { TldrawStaticRendererProps as TldrawRendererProps } from './TldrawStaticRenderer'
    35→```
    36→
    37→## 使用
    38→
    39→```tsx
    40→import { TldrawPlugin, TldrawNode } from '@haklex/rich-ext-tldraw'
    41→import { RichEditor } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
    42→
    43→<RichEditor extraNodes={[TldrawNode]}>
    44→  <TldrawPlugin />
    45→</RichEditor>
    46→```
    47→
    48→## 依赖
    49→
    50→```json
    51→{
    52→  "@haklex/rich-editor": "workspace:*",
    53→  "tldraw": "^3.0.0"
    54→}
    55→```
    56→
    57→## License
    58→
    59→MIT
    60→
```
</details></tool-use>

_**Agent - sidechain (claude-haiku-4-5-20251001 2026-03-02 11:09:54Z)**_

Perfect! I have successfully read all the requested files. Now let me compile a complete summary of the contents:

## Complete File Contents Summary

### Files from haklex/rich-ext-tldraw/ directory:

I have read all source files from the `haklex/rich-ext-tldraw/` directory:

1. **src/index.ts** - Main entry point exporting all public APIs including nodes, renderers, plugin, and context
2. **src/TldrawNode.ts** - Base static TldrawNode class extending DecoratorNode, with `$createTldrawNode` and `$isTldrawNode` helpers
3. **src/TldrawPlugin.tsx** - Registers INSERT_TLDRAW_COMMAND for inserting tldraw nodes into the editor
4. **src/TldrawRenderer.tsx** - Re-export of TldrawDisplayRenderer (backward compatibility)
5. **src/TldrawDisplayRenderer.tsx** - Read-only renderer with intersection observer for lazy loading, zoom controls, fullscreen expand dialog with presentDialog UI
6. **src/TldrawSSRRenderer.tsx** - SSR/placeholder renderer that parses snapshot to show shape count
7. **src/TldrawEditNode.ts** - Edit variant extending TldrawNode with LazyDisplayRenderer and LazyEditRenderer using React.lazy + Suspense, includes slashMenuItems
8. **src/TldrawEditRenderer.tsx** - Full edit mode with inline/remote storage modes, debounced saving, export/copy JSON, upload buttons, unsaved changes confirmation dialog
9. **src/TldrawConfigContext.tsx** - Context providing apiUrl and saveSnapshot callback
10. **src/useTldrawData.ts** - Hook parsing snapshot as inline JSON, HTTP URL, or ref:id format with remote fetch
11. **src/transformer.ts** - Re-exports TLDRAW_BLOCK_TRANSFORMER from @haklex/rich-headless
12. **src/styles.css.ts** - Vanilla Extract CSS defining all styling classes (containers, buttons, dialogs, animations)
13. **src/static.ts** - Static-only exports (render-only, no edit deps)
14. **package.json** - Package metadata, version 0.0.50, exports for main and static entries
15. **README.md** - Chinese documentation with installation and usage examples

### Additional Required Files:

#### @haklex/rich-headless:

1. **haklex/rich-headless/src/index.ts** - Headless node registry with custom nodes (Spoiler, Ruby, Details, etc.) and generic headlessDecorator factory. Contains 20 nodes total for server-side parsing.

2. **haklex/rich-headless/src/transformers.ts** - Markdown transformers for export (Lexical → Markdown) including spoiler, mention, footnote, katex, ruby inline transformers and element transformers for blocks

#### @haklex/rich-renderers:

1. **haklex/rich-renderers/src/tldraw.ts** - Re-exports from @haklex/rich-ext-tldraw/static

2. **haklex/rich-renderers/src/index.ts** - Aggregates all static-only renderers (Alert, Banner, CodeBlock, Image, Video, Mention, Mermaid, Ruby, LinkCard, CodeSnippet, Gallery, Tldraw, Embed)

3. **haklex/rich-renderers/package.json** - Version 0.0.50, aggregates static renderers

4. **haklex/rich-renderers/src/style.css** - Imports CSS from all renderer packages

#### @haklex/rich-renderers-edit:

1. **haklex/rich-renderers-edit/src/tldraw.ts** - Re-exports edit variants from @haklex/rich-ext-tldraw

2. **haklex/rich-renderers-edit/src/index.ts** - Aggregates all edit-mode renderers and nodes, re-exports config

3. **haklex/rich-renderers-edit/package.json** - Version 0.0.50, depends on rich-renderers

#### @haklex/rich-kit-shiro:

1. **haklex/rich-kit-shiro/src/index.ts** - Main integration bundle re-exporting editor, renderer, types, and all dependencies

2. **haklex/rich-kit-shiro/src/ShiroEditor.tsx** - Wrapper component pre-configuring RichEditor with all plugins (BlockHandle, FloatingToolbar, FloatingLinkEditor, TldrawPlugin, EmbedPlugin, PasteLinkCardPlugin, TablePlugins)

3. **haklex/rich-kit-shiro/src/ShiroRenderer.tsx** - Wrapper component pre-configuring RichRenderer with static renderers

4. **haklex/rich-kit-shiro/src/markdown.ts** - Markdown transformer builders combining ALL_TRANSFORMERS with extension transformers

5. **haklex/rich-kit-shiro/src/style.css** - Imports all necessary styles from editor, plugins, and renderers

6. **haklex/rich-kit-shiro/package.json** - Version 0.0.50, production bundle for web app

#### @haklex/rich-editor-demo:

1. **haklex/rich-editor-demo/src/App.tsx** - Demo app with theme toggle, navigation tabs (editor, comments, nodes, presets, diff, linkcard), uses DialogStackProvider and TldrawConfigProvider

2. **haklex/rich-editor-demo/src/fixtures/enhanced-renderers.ts** - Re-exports enhancedRendererConfig

3. **haklex/rich-editor-demo/src/fixtures/node-samples.ts** - 40+ node sample configurations covering all node types (spoiler, katex-inline/block, ruby, mention, footnote, image, video, codeblock, code-snippet, mermaid, linkcard, table, tasklist, alerts, banners, details, galleries, tldraw, grid-container)

4. **haklex/rich-editor-demo/src/fixtures/presets.ts** - 5 comprehensive presets: note-diary, tldraw-showcase, enhanced-renderers, comprehensive-article, tech-article with full content examples

5. **haklex/rich-editor-demo/package.json** - Private demo app depending on all rich editor packages

All files have been read completely with full content provided. The codebase implements a comprehensive Lexical-based rich editor ecosystem with:
- Static/edit node and renderer split for tree-shaking
- Tldraw whiteboard integration with lazy loading and fullscreen editing
- Markdown transformers for export
- Multiple variants and theme support
- Integration bundles for production use

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./haklex/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawNode.ts`

```text
     1→import type {
     2→  EditorConfig,
     3→  LexicalEditor,
     4→  LexicalNode,
     5→  NodeKey,
     6→  SerializedLexicalNode,
     7→  Spread,
     8→} from 'lexical'
     9→import { DecoratorNode } from 'lexical'
    10→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
    11→import { createElement } from 'react'
    12→
    13→import { TldrawSSRRenderer } from './TldrawSSRRenderer'
    14→
    15→export type SerializedTldrawNode = Spread<
    16→  { snapshot: string },
    17→  SerializedLexicalNode
    18→>
    19→
    20→export class TldrawNode extends DecoratorNode<ReactElement> {
    21→  __snapshot: string
    22→
    23→  static getType(): string {
    24→    return 'tldraw'
    25→  }
    26→
    27→  static clone(node: TldrawNode): TldrawNode {
    28→    return new TldrawNode(node.__snapshot, node.__key)
    29→  }
    30→
    31→  constructor(snapshot: string, key?: NodeKey) {
    32→    super(key)
    33→    this.__snapshot = snapshot
    34→  }
    35→
    36→  createDOM(_config: EditorConfig): HTMLElement {
    37→    const div = document.createElement('div')
    38→    div.className = 'rich-tldraw-wrapper'
    39→    return div
    40→  }
    41→
    42→  updateDOM(): boolean {
    43→    return false
    44→  }
    45→
    46→  isInline(): boolean {
    47→    return false
    48→  }
    49→
    50→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedTldrawNode): TldrawNode {
    51→    return $createTldrawNode(serializedNode.snapshot)
    52→  }
    53→
    54→  exportJSON(): SerializedTldrawNode {
    55→    return {
    56→      ...super.exportJSON(),
    57→      type: 'tldraw',
    58→      snapshot: this.__snapshot,
    59→      version: 1,
    60→    }
    61→  }
    62→
    63→  getSnapshot(): string {
    64→    return this.__snapshot
    65→  }
    66→
    67→  setSnapshot(snapshot: string): void {
    68→    const writable = this.getWritable()
    69→    writable.__snapshot = snapshot
    70→  }
    71→
    72→  decorate(_editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    73→    return createElement(TldrawSSRRenderer, {
    74→      snapshot: this.__snapshot,
    75→    })
    76→  }
    77→}
    78→
    79→export function $createTldrawNode(snapshot: string): TldrawNode {
    80→  return new TldrawNode(snapshot)
    81→}
    82→
    83→export function $isTldrawNode(
    84→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
    85→): node is TldrawNode {
    86→  return node instanceof TldrawNode
    87→}
    88→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./haklex/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawEditNode.ts`

```text
     1→import type { SlashMenuItemConfig } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     2→import type { EditorConfig, LexicalEditor, LexicalNode, NodeKey } from 'lexical'
     3→import { $getNodeByKey, $insertNodes } from 'lexical'
     4→import { PenTool } from 'lucide-react'
     5→import type { ReactElement } from 'react'
     6→import { createElement, lazy, Suspense } from 'react'
     7→
     8→import { type SerializedTldrawNode, TldrawNode } from './TldrawNode'
     9→
    10→const LazyDisplayRenderer = lazy(() =>
    11→  import('./TldrawDisplayRenderer').then((m) => ({
    12→    default: m.TldrawDisplayRenderer,
    13→  })),
    14→)
    15→const LazyEditRenderer = lazy(() =>
    16→  import('./TldrawEditRenderer').then((m) => ({
    17→    default: m.TldrawEditRenderer,
    18→  })),
    19→)
    20→
    21→export class TldrawEditNode extends TldrawNode {
    22→  static slashMenuItems: SlashMenuItemConfig[] = [
    23→    {
    24→      title: 'Whiteboard',
    25→      icon: createElement(PenTool, { size: 20 }),
    26→      description: 'Tldraw whiteboard canvas',
    27→      keywords: ['tldraw', 'whiteboard', 'draw', 'canvas'],
    28→      section: 'MEDIA',
    29→      onSelect: (editor) => {
    30→        editor.update(() => {
    31→          $insertNodes([$createTldrawEditNode('{}')])
    32→        })
    33→      },
    34→    },
    35→  ]
    36→
    37→  static clone(node: TldrawEditNode): TldrawEditNode {
    38→    return new TldrawEditNode(node.__snapshot, node.__key)
    39→  }
    40→
    41→  constructor(snapshot: string, key?: NodeKey) {
    42→    super(snapshot, key)
    43→  }
    44→
    45→  static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedTldrawNode): TldrawEditNode {
    46→    return new TldrawEditNode(serializedNode.snapshot)
    47→  }
    48→
    49→  decorate(editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
    50→    const nodeKey = this.__key
    51→    const isEditable = editor.isEditable()
    52→
    53→    const fallback = createElement('div', {
    54→      className: 'rich-tldraw-loading',
    55→      style: {
    56→        position: 'relative',
    57→        width: '100%',
    58→        aspectRatio: '16 / 10',
    59→        margin: '1rem 0',
    60→      },
    61→    })
    62→
    63→    if (isEditable) {
    64→      return createElement(
    65→        Suspense,
    66→        { fallback },
    67→        createElement(LazyEditRenderer, {
    68→          snapshot: this.__snapshot,
    69→          onSnapshotChange: (newSnapshot: string) => {
    70→            editor.update(() => {
    71→              const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey) as TldrawNode | null
    72→              if (node) {
    73→                node.setSnapshot(newSnapshot)
    74→              }
    75→            })
    76→          },
    77→        }),
    78→      )
    79→    }
    80→
    81→    return createElement(
    82→      Suspense,
    83→      { fallback },
    84→      createElement(LazyDisplayRenderer, { snapshot: this.__snapshot }),
    85→    )
    86→  }
    87→}
    88→
    89→export function $createTldrawEditNode(snapshot: string): TldrawEditNode {
    90→  return new TldrawEditNode(snapshot)
    91→}
    92→
    93→export function $isTldrawEditNode(
    94→  node: LexicalNode | null | undefined,
    95→): node is TldrawEditNode {
    96→  return node instanceof TldrawEditNode
    97→}
    98→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./haklex/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawDisplayRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useColorScheme } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     2→import { presentDialog } from '@haklex/rich-editor-ui'
     3→import { usePortalTheme } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
     4→import { Maximize2, ScanSearch, X, ZoomIn, ZoomOut } from 'lucide-react'
     5→import { Component, type FC, type ReactNode } from 'react'
     6→import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     7→
     8→import * as css from './styles.css'
     9→import { useTldrawData } from './useTldrawData'
    10→
    11→export interface TldrawStaticRendererProps {
    12→  snapshot: string
    13→}
    14→
    15→export const TldrawDisplayRenderer: FC<TldrawStaticRendererProps> = ({
    16→  snapshot,
    17→}) => {
    18→  const theme = useColorScheme()
    19→  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
    20→  const [hasEnteredView, setHasEnteredView] = useState(false)
    21→
    22→  useEffect(() => {
    23→    if (hasEnteredView) return
    24→    const target = containerRef.current
    25→    if (!target) return
    26→
    27→    const observer = new IntersectionObserver(
    28→      (entries) => {
    29→        if (entries.some((e) => e.isIntersecting)) {
    30→          setHasEnteredView(true)
    31→          observer.disconnect()
    32→        }
    33→      },
    34→      { rootMargin: '200px 0px', threshold: 0.1 },
    35→    )
    36→    observer.observe(target)
    37→    return () => observer.disconnect()
    38→  }, [hasEnteredView])
    39→
    40→  if (!hasEnteredView) {
    41→    return (
    42→      <div ref={containerRef} className={css.tldrawStaticContainer}>
    43→        <div className={css.tldrawLoading}>Loading tldraw...</div>
    44→      </div>
    45→    )
    46→  }
    47→
    48→  return (
    49→    <div ref={containerRef}>
    50→      <TldrawStaticCanvas snapshot={snapshot} theme={theme} />
    51→    </div>
    52→  )
    53→}
    54→
    55→// --- Fullscreen readonly content ---
    56→
    57→const TldrawExpandContent: FC<{
    58→  dismiss: () => void
    59→  TldrawComponent: FC<any>
    60→  data: Record<string, any>
    61→  theme: 'light' | 'dark'
    62→}> = ({ dismiss, TldrawComponent, data, theme }) => (
    63→  <>
    64→    <div className={css.tldrawDialogHeader}>
    65→      <span className={css.tldrawDialogTitle}>Whiteboard</span>
    66→      <span className={css.tldrawDialogMeta}>tldraw</span>
    67→      <button type="button" className={css.tldrawHeaderClose} onClick={dismiss}>
    68→        <X size={18} />
    69→      </button>
    70→    </div>
    71→    <div className={css.tldrawDialogCanvas}>
    72→      <TldrawComponent
    73→        snapshot={data}
    74→        hideUi
    75→        onMount={(editor: any) => {
    76→          editor.updateInstanceState({ isReadonly: true })
    77→          editor.setCurrentTool('hand')
    78→          editor.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme: theme })
    79→          setTimeout(() => editor.zoomToFit({ animate: false }), 100)
    80→        }}
    81→      />
    82→    </div>
    83→  </>
    84→)
    85→
    86→// --- Main Canvas ---
    87→
    88→const TldrawStaticCanvas: FC<{
    89→  snapshot: string
    90→  theme: 'light' | 'dark'
    91→}> = ({ snapshot, theme }) => {
    92→  const {
    93→    snapshot: data,
    94→    loading: dataLoading,
    95→    error: dataError,
    96→  } = useTldrawData(snapshot)
    97→  const [TldrawComponent, setTldrawComponent] = useState<FC<any> | null>(null)
    98→  const [libLoading, setLibLoading] = useState(true)
    99→  const editorRef = useRef<any>(null)
   100→  const { className: portalClassName } = usePortalTheme()
   101→
   102→  useEffect(() => {
   103→    import('tldraw')
   104→      .then((mod) => {
   105→        setTldrawComponent(() => mod.Tldraw)
   106→        setLibLoading(false)
   107→      })
   108→      .catch(() => setLibLoading(false))
   109→  }, [])
   110→
   111→  useEffect(() => {
   112→    if (editorRef.current?.user?.updateUserPreferences) {
   113→      editorRef.current.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme: theme })
   114→    }
   115→  }, [theme])
   116→
   117→  const handleMount = useCallback(
   118→    (editor: any) => {
   119→      editorRef.current = editor
   120→      editor.updateInstanceState({ isReadonly: true })
   121→      editor.setCurrentTool('hand')
   122→      editor.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme: theme })
   123→      setTimeout(() => {
   124→        editor.zoomToFit({ animate: false })
   125→      }, 100)
   126→    },
   127→    [theme],
   128→  )
   129→
   130→  const handleExpand = useCallback(() => {
   131→    if (!TldrawComponent || !data) return
   132→    presentDialog({
   133→      content: ({ dismiss }) => (
   134→        <TldrawExpandContent
   135→          dismiss={dismiss}
   136→          TldrawComponent={TldrawComponent}
   137→          data={data}
   138→          theme={theme}
   139→        />
   140→      ),
   141→      className: css.tldrawFullscreenPopup,
   142→      portalClassName,
   143→      theme,
   144→      showCloseButton: false,
   145→      clickOutsideToDismiss: true,
   146→    })
   147→  }, [TldrawComponent, data, theme, portalClassName])
   148→
   149→  const loading = dataLoading || libLoading
   150→
   151→  if (loading) {
   152→    return (
   153→      <div className={css.tldrawStaticContainer}>
   154→        <div className={css.tldrawLoading}>Loading tldraw...</div>
   155→      </div>
   156→    )
   157→  }
   158→
   159→  if (dataError || !data) {
   160→    return (
   161→      <div className={css.tldrawStaticContainer}>
   162→        <div className={css.tldrawError}>{dataError || 'No data'}</div>
   163→      </div>
   164→    )
   165→  }
   166→
   167→  if (!TldrawComponent) {
   168→    return (
   169→      <div className={css.tldrawStaticContainer}>
   170→        <div className={css.tldrawError}>Failed to load tldraw</div>
   171→      </div>
   172→    )
   173→  }
   174→
   175→  return (
   176→    <div
   177→      className={css.tldrawStaticContainer}
   178→      data-theme={theme}
   179→      data-color-scheme={theme}
   180→      suppressHydrationWarning
   181→    >
   182→      <TldrawErrorBoundary
   183→        fallback={
   184→          <div className={css.tldrawError}>Failed to render tldraw</div>
   185→        }
   186→      >
   187→        <TldrawComponent snapshot={data} hideUi onMount={handleMount} />
   188→      </TldrawErrorBoundary>
   189→
   190→      <div className={css.tldrawActionGroup}>
   191→        <button
   192→          type="button"
   193→          className={css.tldrawActionButton}
   194→          title="Zoom In"
   195→          onClick={() => editorRef.current?.zoomIn()}
   196→        >
   197→          <ZoomIn size={20} />
   198→        </button>
   199→        <button
   200→          type="button"
   201→          className={css.tldrawActionButton}
   202→          title="Zoom Out"
   203→          onClick={() => editorRef.current?.zoomOut()}
   204→        >
   205→          <ZoomOut size={20} />
   206→        </button>
   207→        <button
   208→          type="button"
   209→          className={css.tldrawActionButton}
   210→          title="Fit to Content"
   211→          onClick={() => editorRef.current?.zoomToFit()}
   212→        >
   213→          <ScanSearch size={20} />
   214→        </button>
   215→        <button
   216→          type="button"
   217→          className={css.tldrawActionButton}
   218→          title="Expand"
   219→          onClick={handleExpand}
   220→        >
   221→          <Maximize2 size={20} />
   222→        </button>
   223→      </div>
   224→    </div>
   225→  )
   226→}
   227→
   228→class TldrawErrorBoundary extends Component<
   229→  { fallback: ReactNode; children: ReactNode },
   230→  { hasError: boolean }
   231→> {
   232→  state = { hasError: false }
   233→  static getDerivedStateFromError() {
   234→    return { hasError: true }
   235→  }
   236→  render() {
   237→    return this.state.hasError ? this.props.fallback : this.props.children
   238→  }
   239→}
   240→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./haklex/rich-ext-tldraw/src/TldrawEditRenderer.tsx`

```text
     1→import { useColorScheme } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     2→import { presentDialog, SegmentedControl } from '@haklex/rich-editor-ui'
     3→import { usePortalTheme } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
     4→import { Clipboard, Download, Pencil, Upload, X } from 'lucide-react'
     5→import type { FC } from 'react'
     6→import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'
     7→
     8→import * as css from './styles.css'
     9→import { useTldrawConfig } from './TldrawConfigContext'
    10→import { useTldrawData } from './useTldrawData'
    11→
    12→export interface TldrawEditRendererProps {
    13→  snapshot: string
    14→  onSnapshotChange: (snapshot: string) => void
    15→}
    16→
    17→const SAVE_DEBOUNCE_MS = 2000
    18→
    19→// ── Dialog content (fullscreen editor) ──────────────────────────
    20→
    21→const TldrawEditorDialogContent: FC<{
    22→  dismiss: () => void
    23→  TldrawComponent: FC<any>
    24→  initialData: Record<string, any> | undefined
    25→  initialSnapshot: string
    26→  theme: 'light' | 'dark'
    27→  onSave: (ref: string) => void
    28→  saveSnapshot?: (snapshot: object) => Promise<string>
    29→  onClose: (doc?: Record<string, any>) => void
    30→}> = ({
    31→  dismiss,
    32→  TldrawComponent,
    33→  initialData,
    34→  initialSnapshot,
    35→  theme,
    36→  onSave,
    37→  saveSnapshot,
    38→  onClose,
    39→}) => {
    40→  const { className: portalClassName } = usePortalTheme()
    41→  const editorRef = useRef<any>(null)
    42→  const saveTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined)
    43→  const [isDirty, setIsDirty] = useState(false)
    44→  const isDirtyRef = useRef(false)
    45→  const [storageMode, setStorageMode] = useState<'inline' | 'remote'>(() => {
    46→    if (!saveSnapshot || !initialSnapshot || !initialSnapshot.trim())
    47→      return 'inline'
    48→    try {
    49→      JSON.parse(initialSnapshot)
    50→      return 'inline'
    51→    } catch {
    52→      return 'remote'
    53→    }
    54→  })
    55→  const storageModeRef = useRef(storageMode)
    56→  const [savedRef, setSavedRef] = useState(() => {
    57→    if (!saveSnapshot || !initialSnapshot || !initialSnapshot.trim()) return ''
    58→    try {
    59→      JSON.parse(initialSnapshot)
    60→      return ''
    61→    } catch {
    62→      return initialSnapshot
    63→    }
    64→  })
    65→  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false)
    66→
    67→  useEffect(() => {
    68→    return () => {
    69→      if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
    70→    }
    71→  }, [])
    72→
    73→  const performSave = useCallback((): Promise<void> => {
    74→    if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
    75→    const editor = editorRef.current
    76→    if (!editor) return Promise.resolve()
    77→    try {
    78→      const doc = editor.store.getSnapshot()
    79→      if (storageModeRef.current === 'remote' && saveSnapshot) {
    80→        setIsSaving(true)
    81→        return saveSnapshot(doc).then(
    82→          (ref) => {
    83→            onSave(ref)
    84→            isDirtyRef.current = false
    85→            setIsDirty(false)
    86→            setIsSaving(false)
    87→            setSavedRef(ref)
    88→          },
    89→          () => {
    90→            setIsSaving(false)
    91→          },
    92→        )
    93→      } else {
    94→        onSave(JSON.stringify(doc))
    95→        isDirtyRef.current = false
    96→        setIsDirty(false)
    97→      }
    98→    } catch {
    99→      // ignore
   100→    }
   101→    return Promise.resolve()
   102→  }, [onSave, saveSnapshot])
   103→
   104→  const handleMount = useCallback(
   105→    (editor: any) => {
   106→      editorRef.current = editor
   107→      editor.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme: theme })
   108→      editor.store.listen(
   109→        () => {
   110→          isDirtyRef.current = true
   111→          setIsDirty(true)
   112→          if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
   113→          saveTimerRef.current = setTimeout(
   114→            () => performSave(),
   115→            SAVE_DEBOUNCE_MS,
   116→          )
   117→        },
   118→        { scope: 'document' },
   119→      )
   120→    },
   121→    [theme, performSave],
   122→  )
   123→
   124→  const handleSaveAndClose = useCallback(() => {
   125→    void performSave().then(() => {
   126→      const editor = editorRef.current
   127→      onClose(editor?.store.getSnapshot())
   128→      dismiss()
   129→    })
   130→  }, [performSave, onClose, dismiss])
   131→
   132→  const handleDiscard = useCallback(() => {
   133→    if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
   134→    dismiss()
   135→  }, [dismiss])
   136→
   137→  const showConfirmDialog = useCallback(() => {
   138→    presentDialog({
   139→      title: 'Unsaved Changes',
   140→      description:
   141→        'You have unsaved changes that will be lost if you close now.',
   142→      content: ({ dismiss: dismissConfirm }) => (
   143→        <div className={css.tldrawConfirmActions}>
   144→          <button
   145→            type="button"
   146→            className={css.tldrawConfirmBtn}
   147→            onClick={dismissConfirm}
   148→          >
   149→            Continue Editing
   150→          </button>
   151→          <button
   152→            type="button"
   153→            className={css.tldrawConfirmBtnDanger}
   154→            onClick={() => {
   155→              dismissConfirm()
   156→              handleDiscard()
   157→            }}
   158→          >
   159→            Discard
   160→          </button>
   161→          <button
   162→            type="button"
   163→            className={css.tldrawConfirmBtnPrimary}
   164→            onClick={() => {
   165→              dismissConfirm()
   166→              handleSaveAndClose()
   167→            }}
   168→          >
   169→            Save & Close
   170→          </button>
   171→        </div>
   172→      ),
   173→      portalClassName,
   174→      theme,
   175→      showCloseButton: false,
   176→      clickOutsideToDismiss: false,
   177→    })
   178→  }, [handleDiscard, handleSaveAndClose, portalClassName, theme])
   179→
   180→  // Intercept ESC in capture phase to prevent Base UI auto-dismiss
   181→  useEffect(() => {
   182→    const handleKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
   183→      if (e.key === 'Escape') {
   184→        e.preventDefault()
   185→        e.stopImmediatePropagation()
   186→        if (isDirtyRef.current) {
   187→          showConfirmDialog()
   188→        } else {
   189→          dismiss()
   190→        }
   191→      }
   192→    }
   193→    document.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown, true)
   194→    return () => document.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown, true)
   195→  }, [dismiss, showConfirmDialog])
   196→
   197→  const attemptClose = useCallback(() => {
   198→    if (isDirtyRef.current) {
   199→      showConfirmDialog()
   200→    } else {
   201→      dismiss()
   202→    }
   203→  }, [dismiss, showConfirmDialog])
   204→
   205→  const handleManualUpload = useCallback(() => {
   206→    performSave()
   207→  }, [performSave])
   208→
   209→  const handleExportJson = useCallback(() => {
   210→    const editor = editorRef.current
   211→    if (!editor) return
   212→    const doc = editor.store.getSnapshot()
   213→    const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(doc, null, 2)], {
   214→      type: 'application/json',
   215→    })
   216→    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob)
   217→    const a = document.createElement('a')
   218→    a.href = url
   219→    a.download = 'tldraw-snapshot.json'
   220→    a.click()
   221→    URL.revokeObjectURL(url)
   222→  }, [])
   223→
   224→  const handleCopyJson = useCallback(() => {
   225→    const editor = editorRef.current
   226→    if (!editor) return
   227→    const doc = editor.store.getSnapshot()
   228→    void navigator.clipboard.writeText(JSON.stringify(doc))
   229→  }, [])
   230→
   231→  const handleCopyRef = useCallback(() => {
   232→    if (savedRef) void navigator.clipboard.writeText(savedRef)
   233→  }, [savedRef])
   234→
   235→  const handleStorageModeChange = useCallback(
   236→    (newMode: 'inline' | 'remote') => {
   237→      setStorageMode(newMode)
   238→      storageModeRef.current = newMode
   239→      if (newMode === 'inline') setSavedRef('')
   240→      performSave()
   241→    },
   242→    [performSave],
   243→  )
   244→
   245→  return (
   246→    <>
   247→      {/* Header */}
   248→      <div className={css.tldrawDialogHeader}>
   249→        <span
   250→          className={css.tldrawStatusDot}
   251→          style={{ backgroundColor: isDirty ? '#f59e0b' : '#22c55e' }}
   252→        />
   253→        <span className={css.tldrawDialogTitle}>Canvas Editor</span>
   254→        <span className={css.tldrawDialogMeta}>tldraw</span>
   255→
   256→        <div className={css.tldrawHeaderActions}>
   257→          {saveSnapshot && (
   258→            <>
   259→              <SegmentedControl
   260→                items={[
   261→                  { value: 'inline', label: 'Inline' },
   262→                  { value: 'remote', label: 'Remote' },
   263→                ]}
   264→                value={storageMode}
   265→                onChange={handleStorageModeChange}
   266→              />
   267→              <div className={css.tldrawActionBarSep} />
   268→              <button
   269→                type="button"
   270→                className={css.tldrawActionBarBtn}
   271→                onClick={handleManualUpload}
   272→                disabled={isSaving}
   273→              >
   274→                <Upload size={14} />
   275→                <span>{isSaving ? 'Saving...' : 'Save'}</span>
   276→              </button>
   277→              <div className={css.tldrawActionBarSep} />
   278→            </>
   279→          )}
   280→          <button
   281→            type="button"
   282→            className={css.tldrawActionBarBtn}
   283→            onClick={handleExportJson}
   284→          >
   285→            <Download size={14} />
   286→            JSON
   287→          </button>
   288→          <button
   289→            type="button"
   290→            className={css.tldrawActionBarBtn}
   291→            onClick={handleCopyJson}
   292→          >
   293→            <Clipboard size={14} />
   294→            Copy
   295→          </button>
   296→          {storageMode === 'remote' && savedRef && (
   297→            <>
   298→              <div className={css.tldrawActionBarSep} />
   299→              <button
   300→                type="button"
   301→                className={css.tldrawActionBarUrl}
   302→                onClick={handleCopyRef}
   303→                title={savedRef}
   304→              >
   305→                {savedRef}
   306→              </button>
   307→            </>
   308→          )}
   309→        </div>
   310→
   311→        <button
   312→          type="button"
   313→          className={css.tldrawHeaderClose}
   314→          onClick={attemptClose}
   315→        >
   316→          <X size={18} />
   317→        </button>
   318→      </div>
   319→
   320→      {/* Canvas */}
   321→      <div className={css.tldrawDialogCanvas}>
   322→        <TldrawComponent snapshot={initialData} onMount={handleMount} />
   323→      </div>
   324→    </>
   325→  )
   326→}
   327→
   328→// ── Main component ──────────────────────────────────────────────
   329→
   330→export const TldrawEditRenderer: FC<TldrawEditRendererProps> = ({
   331→  snapshot,
   332→  onSnapshotChange,
   333→}) => {
   334→  const theme = useColorScheme()
   335→  const { saveSnapshot } = useTldrawConfig()
   336→  const {
   337→    snapshot: initialData,
   338→    loading: dataLoading,
   339→    error: dataError,
   340→  } = useTldrawData(snapshot)
   341→  const [TldrawComponent, setTldrawComponent] = useState<FC<any> | null>(null)
   342→  const [libLoading, setLibLoading] = useState(true)
   343→  const previewEditorRef = useRef<any>(null)
   344→  const initialDataRef = useRef<Record<string, any> | undefined>(undefined)
   345→  const onSnapshotChangeRef = useRef(onSnapshotChange)
   346→  onSnapshotChangeRef.current = onSnapshotChange
   347→  const saveSnapshotRef = useRef(saveSnapshot)
   348→  saveSnapshotRef.current = saveSnapshot
   349→  const snapshotRef = useRef(snapshot)
   350→  snapshotRef.current = snapshot
   351→  const { className: portalClassName } = usePortalTheme()
   352→
   353→  useEffect(() => {
   354→    if (initialData && !initialDataRef.current) {
   355→      initialDataRef.current = initialData
   356→    }
   357→  }, [initialData])
   358→
   359→  useEffect(() => {
   360→    import('tldraw')
   361→      .then((mod) => {
   362→        setTldrawComponent(() => mod.Tldraw)
   363→        setLibLoading(false)
   364→      })
   365→      .catch(() => setLibLoading(false))
   366→  }, [])
   367→
   368→  useEffect(() => {
   369→    if (previewEditorRef.current?.user?.updateUserPreferences) {
   370→      previewEditorRef.current.user.updateUserPreferences({
   371→        colorScheme: theme,
   372→      })
   373→    }
   374→  }, [theme])
   375→
   376→  const handlePreviewMount = useCallback(
   377→    (editor: any) => {
   378→      previewEditorRef.current = editor
   379→      editor.updateInstanceState({ isReadonly: true })
   380→      editor.setCurrentTool('hand')
   381→      editor.user.updateUserPreferences({ colorScheme: theme })
   382→      setTimeout(() => editor.zoomToFit({ animate: false }), 100)
   383→    },
   384→    [theme],
   385→  )
   386→
   387→  const handleOpenEditor = useCallback(() => {
   388→    if (!TldrawComponent) return
   389→    presentDialog({
   390→      content: ({ dismiss }) => (
   391→        <TldrawEditorDialogContent
   392→          dismiss={dismiss}
   393→          TldrawComponent={TldrawComponent}
   394→          initialData={initialDataRef.current}
   395→          initialSnapshot={snapshotRef.current}
   396→          theme={theme}
   397→          onSave={(ref) => onSnapshotChangeRef.current(ref)}
   398→          saveSnapshot={saveSnapshotRef.current}
   399→          onClose={(doc) => {
   400→            if (doc) initialDataRef.current = doc
   401→          }}
   402→        />
   403→      ),
   404→      className: css.tldrawFullscreenPopup,
   405→      portalClassName,
   406→      theme,
   407→      showCloseButton: false,
   408→      clickOutsideToDismiss: false,
   409→    })
   410→  }, [TldrawComponent, theme, portalClassName])
   411→
   412→  const loading = dataLoading || libLoading
   413→
   414→  if (loading || !TldrawComponent) {
   415→    return (
   416→      <div className={css.tldrawEditorContainer}>
   417→        <div className={css.tldrawLoading}>Loading tldraw editor...</div>
   418→      </div>
   419→    )
   420→  }
   421→
   422→  if (dataError) {
   423→    return (
   424→      <div className={css.tldrawEditorContainer}>
   425→        <div className={css.tldrawError}>{dataError}</div>
   426→      </div>
   427→    )
   428→  }
   429→
   430→  return (
   431→    <div className={css.tldrawEditorContainer}>
   432→      <TldrawComponent
   433→        snapshot={initialDataRef.current}
   434→        hideUi
   435→        onMount={handlePreviewMount}
   436→      />
   437→
   438→      <button
   439→        type="button"
   440→        className={css.tldrawEditOverlay}
   441→        onClick={handleOpenEditor}
   442→      >
   443→        <span className={css.tldrawEditLabel}>
   444→          <Pencil size={16} />
   445→          Edit Whiteboard
   446→        </span>
   447→      </button>
   448→    </div>
   449→  )
   450→}
   451→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>

```text
     1→import type { FC } from 'react'
     2→
     3→export interface TldrawSSRRendererProps {
     4→  snapshot: string
     5→}
     6→
     7→export const TldrawSSRRenderer: FC<TldrawSSRRendererProps> = ({ snapshot }) => {
     8→  let label = 'Tldraw Whiteboard'
     9→  try {
    10→    const data = JSON.parse(snapshot)
    11→    if (data && typeof data === 'object') {
    12→      const shapeCount = Object.keys(data).filter((k) =>
    13→        k.startsWith('shape:'),
    14→      ).length
    15→      if (shapeCount > 0) {
    16→        label = `Tldraw Whiteboard (${shapeCount} shapes)`
    17→      }
    18→    }
    19→  } catch {
    20→    // snapshot might be a URL ref or invalid JSON — show generic placeholder
    21→  }
    22→
    23→  return (
    24→    <div
    25→      className="rich-tldraw-ssr-placeholder"
    26→      style={{
    27→        position: 'relative',
    28→        width: '100%',
    29→        aspectRatio: '16 / 10',
    30→        display: 'flex',
    31→        alignItems: 'center',
    32→        justifyContent: 'center',
    33→        backgroundColor: 'var(--rich-tldraw-bg, #f5f5f5)',
    34→        borderRadius: '8px',
    35→        border: '1px solid var(--rich-tldraw-border, #e5e5e5)',
    36→        color: 'var(--rich-tldraw-fg, #737373)',
    37→        fontSize: '14px',
    38→      }}
    39→      aria-label={label}
    40→    >
    41→      <span>{label}</span>
    42→    </div>
    43→  )
    44→}
    45→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import { useLexicalComposerContext } from '@lexical/react/LexicalComposerContext'
     2→import { $insertNodes, COMMAND_PRIORITY_EDITOR, createCommand } from 'lexical'
     3→import { useEffect } from 'react'
     4→
     5→import { $createTldrawEditNode } from './TldrawEditNode'
     6→
     7→export const INSERT_TLDRAW_COMMAND = createCommand<string>('INSERT_TLDRAW')
     8→
     9→export function TldrawPlugin() {
    10→  const [editor] = useLexicalComposerContext()
    11→
    12→  useEffect(() => {
    13→    return editor.registerCommand(
    14→      INSERT_TLDRAW_COMMAND,
    15→      (snapshot) => {
    16→        const node = $createTldrawEditNode(snapshot)
    17→        $insertNodes([node])
    18→        return true
    19→      },
    20→      COMMAND_PRIORITY_EDITOR,
    21→    )
    22→  }, [editor])
    23→
    24→  return null
    25→}
    26→
```
</details></tool-use>

     1→import type { ReactNode } from 'react'
     2→import { createContext, use, useMemo } from 'react'
     3→
     4→export interface TldrawConfig {
     5→  apiUrl?: string
     6→  saveSnapshot?: (snapshot: object) => Promise<string>
     7→}
     8→
     9→const TldrawConfigContext = createContext<TldrawConfig>({})
    10→
    11→export function TldrawConfigProvider({
    12→  apiUrl,
    13→  saveSnapshot,
    14→  children,
    15→}: TldrawConfig & { children: ReactNode }) {
    16→  const value = useMemo(
    17→    () => ({ apiUrl, saveSnapshot }),
    18→    [apiUrl, saveSnapshot],
    19→  )
    20→  return (
    21→    <TldrawConfigContext.Provider value={value}>
    22→      {children}
    23→    </TldrawConfigContext.Provider>
    24→  )
    25→}
    26→
    27→export function useTldrawConfig(): TldrawConfig {
    28→  return use(TldrawConfigContext)
    29→}
    30→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./haklex/rich-ext-tldraw/src/useTldrawData.ts`

```text
     1→import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import { useTldrawConfig } from './TldrawConfigContext'
     4→
     5→interface TldrawDataState {
     6→  snapshot: Record<string, any> | undefined
     7→  loading: boolean
     8→  error: string
     9→}
    10→
    11→export function useTldrawData(data: string): TldrawDataState {
    12→  const { apiUrl } = useTldrawConfig()
    13→
    14→  const parsed = useMemo(() => {
    15→    if (!data) return { type: 'empty' as const }
    16→
    17→    try {
    18→      const json = JSON.parse(data)
    19→      if (json && typeof json === 'object') {
    20→        return {
    21→          type: 'inline' as const,
    22→          snapshot: json as Record<string, any>,
    23→        }
    24→      }
    25→    } catch {
    26→      // not JSON
    27→    }
    28→
    29→    const firstLine = data.split('\n')[0].trim()
    30→    let fetchUrl: string | undefined
    31→
    32→    if (firstLine.startsWith('http')) {
    33→      fetchUrl = firstLine
    34→    } else if (firstLine.startsWith('ref:') && apiUrl) {
    35→      fetchUrl = `${apiUrl}/objects/${firstLine.slice(4)}`
    36→    }
    37→
    38→    if (fetchUrl) {
    39→      return { type: 'remote' as const, fetchUrl }
    40→    }
    41→
    42→    return {
    43→      type: 'error' as const,
    44→      error: firstLine.startsWith('ref:')
    45→        ? 'Missing apiUrl for ref resolution'
    46→        : 'Unrecognized snapshot format',
    47→    }
    48→  }, [data, apiUrl])
    49→
    50→  const fetchUrl = parsed.type === 'remote' ? parsed.fetchUrl : undefined
    51→
    52→  const [remoteSnapshot, setRemoteSnapshot] = useState<
    53→    Record<string, any> | undefined
    54→  >()
    55→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(!!fetchUrl)
    56→  const [error, setError] = useState('')
    57→
    58→  useEffect(() => {
    59→    if (!fetchUrl) return
    60→
    61→    let cancelled = false
    62→    setLoading(true)
    63→    setError('')
    64→
    65→    fetch(fetchUrl)
    66→      .then((res) => {
    67→        if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`)
    68→        return res.json()
    69→      })
    70→      .then((json) => {
    71→        if (!cancelled) {
    72→          setRemoteSnapshot(json)
    73→          setLoading(false)
    74→        }
    75→      })
    76→      .catch((err) => {
    77→        if (!cancelled) {
    78→          setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to load')
    79→          setLoading(false)
    80→        }
    81→      })
    82→
    83→    return () => {
    84→      cancelled = true
    85→    }
    86→  }, [fetchUrl])
    87→
    88→  if (parsed.type === 'inline') {
    89→    return { snapshot: parsed.snapshot, loading: false, error: '' }
    90→  }
    91→
    92→  if (parsed.type === 'remote') {
    93→    return { snapshot: remoteSnapshot, loading, error }
    94→  }
    95→
    96→  if (parsed.type === 'error') {
    97→    return { snapshot: undefined, loading: false, error: parsed.error }
    98→  }
    99→
   100→  return { snapshot: undefined, loading: false, error: '' }
   101→}
   102→
```
</details></tool-use>
