    15→import { useExcalidrawData } from './useExcalidrawData'
    16→
    17→export interface ExcalidrawEditRendererProps {
    18→  snapshot: string
    19→  onSnapshotChange: (snapshot: string) => void
    20→}
    21→
    22→const SAVE_DEBOUNCE_MS = 2000
    23→
    24→// ── Dialog content (fullscreen editor) ──────────────────────────
    25→
    26→const ExcalidrawEditorDialogContent: FC<{
    27→  dismiss: () => void
    28→  ExcalidrawComponent: ComponentType<ExcalidrawProps>
    29→  initialData: Record<string, any> | undefined
    30→  initialSnapshot: string
    31→  theme: 'light' | 'dark'
    32→  onSave: (ref: string) => void
    33→  saveSnapshot?: (snapshot: object) => Promise<string>
    34→  onClose: (doc?: Record<string, any>) => void
    35→  baseRef?: string
    36→  baseData?: Record<string, any>
    37→}> = ({
    38→  dismiss,
    39→  ExcalidrawComponent,
    40→  initialData,
    41→  initialSnapshot,
    42→  theme,
    43→  onSave,
    44→  saveSnapshot,
    45→  onClose,
    46→  baseRef,
    47→  baseData,
    48→}) => {
    49→  const { className: portalClassName } = usePortalTheme()
    50→  const apiRef = useRef<any>(null)
    51→  const saveTimerRef = useRef<ReturnType<typeof setTimeout>>(undefined)
    52→  const [isDirty, setIsDirty] = useState(false)
    53→  const isDirtyRef = useRef(false)
    54→  const initializedRef = useRef(false)
    55→  const baseRefRef = useRef(baseRef)
    56→  const baseDataRef = useRef(baseData)
    57→  const [storageMode, setStorageMode] = useState<'inline' | 'remote' | 'delta'>(
    58→    () => {
    59→      if (!saveSnapshot || !initialSnapshot || !initialSnapshot.trim())
    60→        return 'inline'
    61→      try {
    62→        JSON.parse(initialSnapshot)
    63→        return 'inline'
    64→      } catch {
    65→        const lines = initialSnapshot.split('\n')
    66→        if (lines.length > 1 && lines.slice(1).join('\n').trim()) {
    67→          return 'delta'
    68→        }
    69→        return 'remote'
    70→      }
    71→    },
    72→  )
    73→  const storageModeRef = useRef(storageMode)
    74→  const [savedRef, setSavedRef] = useState(() => {
    75→    if (!saveSnapshot || !initialSnapshot || !initialSnapshot.trim()) return ''
    76→    try {
    77→      JSON.parse(initialSnapshot)
    78→      return ''
    79→    } catch {
    80→      return initialSnapshot.split('\n')[0].trim()
    81→    }
    82→  })
    83→  const [isSaving, setIsSaving] = useState(false)
    84→
    85→  useEffect(() => {
    86→    return () => {
    87→      if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
    88→    }
    89→  }, [])
    90→
    91→  const getSnapshot = useCallback(() => {
    92→    const api = apiRef.current
    93→    if (!api) return
    94→    const appState = api.getAppState()
    95→    return {
    96→      elements: api.getSceneElements(),
    97→      appState: {
    98→        viewBackgroundColor: appState.viewBackgroundColor,
    99→        gridSize: appState.gridSize,
   100→      },
   101→      files: api.getFiles(),
   102→    }
   103→  }, [])
   104→
   105→  const performSave = useCallback((): Promise<void> => {
   106→    if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
   107→    const doc = getSnapshot()
   108→    if (!doc) return Promise.resolve()
   109→    const mode = storageModeRef.current
   110→
   111→    if (mode === 'delta' && saveSnapshot) {
   112→      setIsSaving(true)
   113→      const frozenDoc = structuredClone(doc)
   114→      return (async () => {
   115→        try {
   116→          const currentBaseRef = baseRefRef.current
   117→          const currentBaseData = baseDataRef.current
   118→
   119→          if (currentBaseRef && currentBaseData) {
   120→            const { diff } = await import('jsondiffpatch')
   121→            const delta = diff(currentBaseData, frozenDoc)
   122→            onSave(
   123→              delta
   124→                ? [currentBaseRef, JSON.stringify(delta)].join('\n')
   125→                : currentBaseRef,
   126→            )
   127→          } else {
   128→            // No base ref yet — upload full file as new base
   129→            const ref = await saveSnapshot(doc)
   130→            baseRefRef.current = ref
   131→            baseDataRef.current = doc as Record<string, any>
   132→            onSave(ref)
   133→            setSavedRef(ref)
   134→          }
   135→          isDirtyRef.current = false
   136→          setIsDirty(false)
   137→        } finally {
   138→          setIsSaving(false)
   139→        }
   140→      })()
   141→    }
   142→
   143→    if (mode === 'remote' && saveSnapshot) {
   144→      setIsSaving(true)
   145→      return saveSnapshot(doc).then(
   146→        (ref) => {
   147→          onSave(ref)
   148→          baseRefRef.current = ref
   149→          baseDataRef.current = doc as Record<string, any>
   150→          isDirtyRef.current = false
   151→          setIsDirty(false)
   152→          setIsSaving(false)
   153→          setSavedRef(ref)
   154→        },
   155→        () => {
   156→          setIsSaving(false)
   157→        },
   158→      )
   159→    }
   160→
   161→    // inline
   162→    try {
   163→      onSave(JSON.stringify(doc))
   164→      isDirtyRef.current = false
   165→      setIsDirty(false)
   166→    } catch (err) {
   167→      console.error('[excalidraw] inline save failed', err)
   168→    }
   169→    return Promise.resolve()
   170→  }, [onSave, saveSnapshot, getSnapshot])
   171→
   172→  const handleChange = useCallback(
   173→    (elements: readonly any[]) => {
   174→      if (!initializedRef.current) {
   175→        // Skip the first onChange fired during excalidraw mount
   176→        initializedRef.current = true
   177→        return
   178→      }
   179→      // Only schedule save when there are actual drawn elements
   180→      if (elements.length === 0) return
   181→      if (!isDirtyRef.current) {
   182→        isDirtyRef.current = true
   183→        setIsDirty(true)
   184→      }
   185→      if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
   186→      saveTimerRef.current = setTimeout(() => performSave(), SAVE_DEBOUNCE_MS)
   187→    },
   188→    [performSave],
   189→  )
   190→
   191→  const handleSaveAndClose = useCallback(() => {
   192→    void performSave().then(() => {
   193→      const doc = getSnapshot()
   194→      onClose(doc)
   195→      dismiss()
   196→    })
   197→  }, [performSave, getSnapshot, onClose, dismiss])
   198→
   199→  const handleDiscard = useCallback(() => {
   200→    if (saveTimerRef.current) clearTimeout(saveTimerRef.current)
   201→    dismiss()
   202→  }, [dismiss])
   203→
   204→  const showConfirmDialog = useCallback(() => {
   205→    presentDialog({
   206→      title: 'Unsaved Changes',
   207→      description:
   208→        'You have unsaved changes that will be lost if you close now.',
   209→      content: ({ dismiss: dismissConfirm }) => (
   210→        <div className={css.excalidrawConfirmActions}>
   211→          <button
   212→            type="button"
   213→            className={css.excalidrawConfirmBtn}
   214→            onClick={dismissConfirm}
   215→          >
   216→            Continue Editing
   217→          </button>
   218→          <button
   219→            type="button"
   220→            className={css.excalidrawConfirmBtnDanger}
   221→            onClick={() => {
   222→              dismissConfirm()
   223→              handleDiscard()
   224→            }}
   225→          >
   226→            Discard
   227→          </button>
   228→          <button
   229→            type="button"
   230→            className={css.excalidrawConfirmBtnPrimary}
   231→            onClick={() => {
   232→              dismissConfirm()
   233→              handleSaveAndClose()
   234→            }}
   235→          >
   236→            Save & Close
   237→          </button>
   238→        </div>
   239→      ),
   240→      portalClassName,
   241→      theme,
   242→      showCloseButton: false,
   243→      clickOutsideToDismiss: false,
   244→    })
   245→  }, [handleDiscard, handleSaveAndClose, portalClassName, theme])
   246→
   247→  const attemptClose = useCallback(() => {
   248→    if (isDirtyRef.current) {
   249→      showConfirmDialog()
   250→    } else {
   251→      onClose(getSnapshot())
   252→      dismiss()
   253→    }
   254→  }, [dismiss, showConfirmDialog, getSnapshot, onClose])
   255→
   256→  // Intercept ESC in capture phase to prevent Base UI auto-dismiss
   257→  useEffect(() => {
   258→    const handleKeyDown = (e: KeyboardEvent) => {
   259→      if (e.key === 'Escape') {
   260→        e.preventDefault()
   261→        e.stopImmediatePropagation()
   262→        attemptClose()
   263→      }
   264→    }
   265→    document.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown, true)
   266→    return () => document.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown, true)
   267→  }, [attemptClose])
   268→
   269→  const handleManualUpload = useCallback(() => {
   270→    performSave()
   271→  }, [performSave])
   272→
   273→  const handleExportJson = useCallback(() => {
   274→    const doc = getSnapshot()
   275→    if (!doc) return
   276→    const blob = new Blob([JSON.stringify(doc, null, 2)], {
   277→      type: 'application/json',
   278→    })
   279→    const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob)
   280→    const a = document.createElement('a')
   281→    a.href = url
   282→    a.download = 'excalidraw-snapshot.json'
   283→    a.click()
   284→    URL.revokeObjectURL(url)
   285→  }, [getSnapshot])
   286→
   287→  const handleCopyJson = useCallback(() => {
   288→    const doc = getSnapshot()
   289→    if (!doc) return
   290→    void navigator.clipboard.writeText(JSON.stringify(doc))
   291→  }, [getSnapshot])
   292→
   293→  const handleCopyRef = useCallback(() => {
   294→    if (savedRef) void navigator.clipboard.writeText(savedRef)
   295→  }, [savedRef])
   296→
   297→  const handleStorageModeChange = useCallback(
   298→    (newMode: 'inline' | 'remote' | 'delta') => {
   299→      setStorageMode(newMode)
   300→      storageModeRef.current = newMode
   301→      if (newMode === 'inline') setSavedRef('')
   302→      performSave()
   303→    },
   304→    [performSave],
   305→  )
   306→
   307→  return (
   308→    <>
   309→      {/* Header */}
   310→      <div className={css.excalidrawDialogHeader}>
   311→        <span
   312→          className={css.excalidrawStatusDot}
   313→          style={{ backgroundColor: isDirty ? '#f59e0b' : '#22c55e' }}
   314→        />
   315→        <span className={css.excalidrawDialogTitle}>Canvas Editor</span>
   316→        <span className={css.excalidrawDialogMeta}>excalidraw</span>
   317→
   318→        <div className={css.excalidrawHeaderActions}>
   319→          {saveSnapshot && (
   320→            <>
   321→              <SegmentedControl
   322→                items={[
   323→                  { value: 'inline', label: 'Inline' },
   324→                  { value: 'remote', label: 'Remote' },
   325→                  { value: 'delta', label: 'Delta' },
   326→                ]}
   327→                value={storageMode}
   328→                onChange={handleStorageModeChange}
   329→              />
   330→              <div className={css.excalidrawActionBarSep} />
   331→              <button
   332→                type="button"
   333→                className={css.excalidrawActionBarBtn}
   334→                onClick={handleManualUpload}
   335→                disabled={isSaving}
   336→              >
   337→                <Upload size={14} />
   338→                <span>{isSaving ? 'Saving...' : 'Save'}</span>
   339→              </button>
   340→              <div className={css.excalidrawActionBarSep} />
   341→            </>
   342→          )}
   343→          <button
   344→            type="button"
   345→            className={css.excalidrawActionBarBtn}
   346→            onClick={handleExportJson}
   347→          >
   348→            <Download size={14} />
   349→            JSON
   350→          </button>
   351→          <button
   352→            type="button"
   353→            className={css.excalidrawActionBarBtn}
   354→            onClick={handleCopyJson}
   355→          >
   356→            <Clipboard size={14} />
   357→            Copy
   358→          </button>
   359→          {storageMode === 'remote' && savedRef && (
   360→            <>
   361→              <div className={css.excalidrawActionBarSep} />
   362→              <button
   363→                type="button"
   364→                className={css.excalidrawActionBarUrl}
   365→                onClick={handleCopyRef}
   366→                title={savedRef}
   367→              >
   368→                {savedRef}
   369→              </button>
   370→            </>
   371→          )}
   372→        </div>
   373→
   374→        <button
   375→          type="button"
   376→          className={css.excalidrawHeaderClose}
   377→          onClick={attemptClose}
   378→        >
   379→          <X size={18} />
   380→        </button>
   381→      </div>
   382→
   383→      {/* Canvas */}
   384→      <div className={css.excalidrawDialogCanvas}>
   385→        <ExcalidrawComponent
   386→          initialData={initialData}
   387→          theme={theme}
   388→          onChange={handleChange}
   389→          excalidrawAPI={(api: ExcalidrawImperativeAPI) => {
   390→            apiRef.current = api
   391→          }}
   392→        />
   393→      </div>
   394→    </>
   395→  )
   396→}
   397→
   398→// ── Main component ──────────────────────────────────────────────
   399→
   400→export const ExcalidrawEditRenderer: FC<ExcalidrawEditRendererProps> = ({
   401→  snapshot,
   402→  onSnapshotChange,
   403→}) => {
   404→  const theme = useColorScheme()
   405→  const { saveSnapshot } = useExcalidrawConfig()
   406→  const {
   407→    snapshot: initialData,
   408→    loading: dataLoading,
   409→    error: dataError,
   410→    baseRef,
   411→    baseData,
   412→  } = useExcalidrawData(snapshot)
   413→  const [ExcalidrawComponent, setExcalidrawComponent] =
   414→    useState<FC<any> | null>(null)
   415→  const [libLoading, setLibLoading] = useState(true)
   416→  const previewApiRef = useRef<any>(null)
   417→  const initialDataRef = useRef<Record<string, any> | undefined>(undefined)
   418→  const [previewKey, setPreviewKey] = useState(0)
   419→  const onSnapshotChangeRef = useRef(onSnapshotChange)
   420→  onSnapshotChangeRef.current = onSnapshotChange
   421→  const saveSnapshotRef = useRef(saveSnapshot)
   422→  saveSnapshotRef.current = saveSnapshot
   423→  const snapshotRef = useRef(snapshot)
   424→  snapshotRef.current = snapshot
   425→  const { className: portalClassName } = usePortalTheme()
   426→
   427→  useEffect(() => {
   428→    if (initialData && !initialDataRef.current) {
   429→      initialDataRef.current = initialData
   430→    }
   431→  }, [initialData])
   432→
   433→  useEffect(() => {
   434→    import('@excalidraw/excalidraw')
   435→      .then((mod: any) => {
   436→        const Comp = mod.Excalidraw || mod.default?.Excalidraw
   437→        if (Comp) setExcalidrawComponent(() => Comp)
   438→        setLibLoading(false)
   439→      })
   440→      .catch(() => setLibLoading(false))
   441→  }, [])
   442→
   443→  const baseRefRef = useRef(baseRef)
   444→  const baseDataRefOuter = useRef(baseData)
   445→  useEffect(() => {
   446→    if (baseRef) baseRefRef.current = baseRef
   447→  }, [baseRef])
   448→  useEffect(() => {
   449→    if (baseData) baseDataRefOuter.current = baseData
   450→  }, [baseData])
   451→
   452→  const handleOpenEditor = useCallback(() => {
   453→    if (!ExcalidrawComponent || dataLoading) return
   454→    presentDialog({
   455→      content: ({ dismiss }) => (
   456→        <ExcalidrawEditorDialogContent
   457→          dismiss={dismiss}
   458→          ExcalidrawComponent={ExcalidrawComponent}
   459→          initialData={initialDataRef.current}
   460→          initialSnapshot={snapshotRef.current}
   461→          theme={theme}
   462→          onSave={(ref) => onSnapshotChangeRef.current(ref)}
   463→          saveSnapshot={saveSnapshotRef.current}
   464→          onClose={(doc) => {
   465→            if (doc) {
   466→              initialDataRef.current = doc
   467→              setPreviewKey((k) => k + 1)
   468→            }
   469→          }}
   470→          baseRef={baseRefRef.current}
   471→          baseData={baseDataRefOuter.current}
   472→        />
   473→      ),
   474→      className: css.excalidrawFullscreenPopup,
   475→      portalClassName,
   476→      theme,
   477→      showCloseButton: false,
   478→      clickOutsideToDismiss: false,
   479→    })
   480→  }, [ExcalidrawComponent, dataLoading, theme, portalClassName])
   481→
   482→  const loading = dataLoading || libLoading
   483→
   484→  if (loading || !ExcalidrawComponent) {
   485→    return (
   486→      <div className={css.excalidrawEditorContainer}>
   487→        <div className={css.excalidrawLoading}>
   488→          Loading excalidraw editor...
   489→        </div>
   490→      </div>
   491→    )
   492→  }
   493→
   494→  if (dataError) {
   495→    return (
   496→      <div className={css.excalidrawEditorContainer}>
   497→        <div className={css.excalidrawError}>{dataError}</div>
   498→      </div>
   499→    )
   500→  }
   501→
   502→  return (
   503→    <div className={css.excalidrawEditorContainer}>
   504→      <ExcalidrawComponent
   505→        key={previewKey}
   506→        initialData={initialDataRef.current}
   507→        viewModeEnabled
   508→        zenModeEnabled
   509→        theme={theme}
   510→        UIOptions={readonlyUIOptions}
   511→        excalidrawAPI={(api: ExcalidrawImperativeAPI) => {
   512→          previewApiRef.current = api
   513→          setTimeout(() => api.scrollToContent(), 100)
   514→        }}
   515→      />
   516→
   517→      <button
   518→        type="button"
   519→        className={css.excalidrawEditOverlay}
   520→        onClick={handleOpenEditor}
   521→      >
   522→        <span className={css.excalidrawEditLabel}>
   523→          <Pencil size={16} />
   524→          Edit Whiteboard
   525→        </span>
   526→      </button>
   527→    </div>
   528→  )
   529→}
   530→
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./haklex/rich-ext-excalidraw/src/useExcalidrawData.ts`

```text
     1→import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import { useExcalidrawConfig } from './ExcalidrawConfigContext'
     4→
     5→export interface ExcalidrawDataState {
     6→  snapshot: Record<string, any> | undefined
     7→  loading: boolean
     8→  error: string
     9→  /** The base reference line (URL or ref:file/xxx) when snapshot is remote or incremental */
    10→  baseRef?: string
    11→  /** The raw base data before delta patch (for computing new diffs in edit mode) */
    12→  baseData?: Record<string, any>
    13→}
    14→
    15→type ParsedData =
    16→  | { type: 'empty' }
    17→  | { type: 'inline'; snapshot: Record<string, any> }
    18→  | { type: 'remote'; fetchUrl: string; refLine: string }
    19→  | { type: 'incremental'; fetchUrl: string; refLine: string; delta: object }
    20→  | { type: 'error'; error: string }
    21→
    22→export function useExcalidrawData(data: string): ExcalidrawDataState {
    23→  const { apiUrl } = useExcalidrawConfig()
    24→
    25→  const parsed = useMemo((): ParsedData => {
    26→    if (!data) return { type: 'empty' }
    27→
    28→    try {
    29→      const json = JSON.parse(data)
    30→      if (json && typeof json === 'object') {
    31→        return { type: 'inline', snapshot: json as Record<string, any> }
    32→      }
    33→    } catch {
    34→      // not JSON — check for URL/ref
    35→    }
    36→
    37→    const lines = data.split('\n')
    38→    const firstLine = lines[0].trim()
    39→    let fetchUrl: string | undefined
    40→    const refLine = firstLine
    41→
    42→    if (firstLine.startsWith('http') || firstLine.startsWith('blob:')) {
    43→      fetchUrl = firstLine
    44→    } else if (firstLine.startsWith('ref:') && apiUrl) {
    45→      fetchUrl = `${apiUrl}/objects/${firstLine.slice(4)}`
    46→    }
    47→
    48→    if (!fetchUrl) {
    49→      return {
    50→        type: 'error',
    51→        error: firstLine.startsWith('ref:')
    52→          ? 'Missing apiUrl for ref resolution'
    53→          : 'Unrecognized snapshot format',
    54→      }
    55→    }
    56→
    57→    // Check for delta diff in remaining lines
    58→    const remainingLines = lines.slice(1).join('\n').trim()
    59→    if (remainingLines) {
    60→      try {
    61→        const delta = JSON.parse(remainingLines)
    62→        if (delta && typeof delta === 'object') {
    63→          return { type: 'incremental', fetchUrl, refLine, delta }
    64→        }
    65→      } catch {
    66→        // not valid JSON delta — treat as plain remote
    67→      }
    68→    }
    69→
    70→    return { type: 'remote', fetchUrl, refLine }
    71→  }, [data, apiUrl])
    72→
    73→  const [remoteSnapshot, setRemoteSnapshot] = useState<
    74→    Record<string, any> | undefined
    75→  >()
    76→  const [baseData, setBaseData] = useState<Record<string, any> | undefined>()
    77→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(
    78→    parsed.type === 'remote' || parsed.type === 'incremental',
    79→  )
    80→  const [error, setError] = useState('')
    81→
    82→  useEffect(() => {
    83→    if (parsed.type !== 'remote' && parsed.type !== 'incremental') return
    84→
    85→    const { fetchUrl } = parsed
    86→    const delta = parsed.type === 'incremental' ? parsed.delta : undefined
    87→
    88→    let cancelled = false
    89→    setLoading(true)
    90→    setError('')
    91→
    92→    fetch(fetchUrl)
    93→      .then((res) => {
    94→        if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`)
    95→        return res.json()
    96→      })
    97→      .then(async (json) => {
    98→        if (cancelled) return
    99→        setBaseData(json)
   100→
   101→        if (delta) {
   102→          const { patch } = await import('jsondiffpatch')
   103→          if (cancelled) return
   104→          const patched = patch(structuredClone(json), delta as any)
   105→          setRemoteSnapshot(patched as Record<string, any>)
   106→        } else {
   107→          setRemoteSnapshot(json)
   108→        }
   109→        setLoading(false)
   110→      })
   111→      .catch((err) => {
   112→        if (!cancelled) {
   113→          setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to load')
   114→          setLoading(false)
   115→        }
   116→      })
   117→
   118→    return () => {
   119→      cancelled = true
   120→    }
   121→  }, [parsed])
   122→
   123→  if (parsed.type === 'inline') {
   124→    return { snapshot: parsed.snapshot, loading: false, error: '' }
   125→  }
   126→
   127→  if (parsed.type === 'remote' || parsed.type === 'incremental') {
   128→    return {
   129→      snapshot: remoteSnapshot,
   130→      loading,
   131→      error,
   132→      baseRef: parsed.refLine,
   133→      baseData,
   134→    }
   135→  }
   136→
   137→  if (parsed.type === 'error') {
   138→    return { snapshot: undefined, loading: false, error: parsed.error }
   139→  }
   140→
   141→  return { snapshot: undefined, loading: false, error: '' }
   142→}
   143→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import '@haklex/rich-diff/style.css'
     2→
     3→import { RichDiff } from '@haklex/rich-diff'
     4→import type { RichEditorVariant } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     5→import { ColorSchemeProvider, getVariantClass } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     6→import type { ExcalidrawEditRendererProps } from '@haklex/rich-ext-excalidraw'
     7→import { LinkCardRenderer } from '@haklex/rich-renderer-linkcard/static'
     8→import { ExcalidrawConfigProvider } from '@haklex/rich-renderers/excalidraw'
     9→import { RichRenderer } from '@haklex/rich-static-renderer'
    10→import { PortalThemeProvider } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
    11→import { type FC, useCallback, useState } from 'react'
    12→
    13→import { Panel } from '../components/Panel'
    14→import { useTheme } from '../context/ThemeContext'
    15→import { diffSamples } from '../fixtures/diff-samples'
    16→import {

    20→
    21→// ── Excalidraw Demo Data ───────────────────────────────────────
    22→
    23→const excalidrawInlineSnapshot = JSON.stringify({
    24→  elements: [
    25→    {
    26→      id: 'rect1',
    27→      type: 'rectangle',
    28→      x: 100,
    29→      y: 100,
    30→      width: 200,
    31→      height: 120,
    32→      strokeColor: '#1971c2',
    33→      backgroundColor: '#a5d8ff',
    34→      fillStyle: 'solid',
    35→      strokeWidth: 2,
    36→      roughness: 1,
    37→      opacity: 100,
    38→      seed: 1,
    39→      version: 1,
    40→      versionNonce: 1,
    41→      isDeleted: false,
    42→      boundElements: null,
    43→      updated: 1,
    44→      link: null,
    45→      locked: false,
    46→    },
    47→    {
    48→      id: 'ellipse1',
    49→      type: 'ellipse',
    50→      x: 350,
    51→      y: 140,
    52→      width: 160,
    53→      height: 80,
    54→      strokeColor: '#e8590c',
    55→      backgroundColor: '#ffc078',
    56→      fillStyle: 'solid',
    57→      strokeWidth: 2,
    58→      roughness: 1,
    59→      opacity: 100,
    60→      seed: 2,
    61→      version: 1,
    62→      versionNonce: 2,
    63→      isDeleted: false,
    64→      boundElements: null,
    65→      updated: 1,
    66→      link: null,
    67→      locked: false,
    68→    },
    69→  ],
    70→  appState: { viewBackgroundColor: '#ffffff' },
    71→  files: {},
    72→})
    73→
    74→// ── Excalidraw Section ─────────────────────────────────────────
    75→
    76→function ExcalidrawSection() {
    77→  const theme = useTheme()
    78→  const [blobStore] = useState<Map<string, string>>(() => new Map())
    79→
    80→  const mockSaveSnapshot = useCallback(
    81→    async (snapshot: object) => {
    82→      const json = JSON.stringify(snapshot)
    83→      const blob = new Blob([json], { type: 'application/json' })
    84→      const url = URL.createObjectURL(blob)
    85→      blobStore.set(url, json)
    86→      return url
    87→    },
    88→    [blobStore],
    89→  )
    90→
    91→  const [remoteSnapshot, setRemoteSnapshot] = useState(() => {
    92→    const blob = new Blob([excalidrawInlineSnapshot], {
    93→      type: 'application/json',
    94→    })
    95→    return URL.createObjectURL(blob)
    96→  })
    97→  const [deltaSnapshot, setDeltaSnapshot] = useState(() => {
    98→    const blob = new Blob([excalidrawInlineSnapshot], {
    99→      type: 'application/json',
   100→    })
   101→    // Delta format: "baseUrl\n{}" — empty delta triggers delta mode detection
   102→    return `${URL.createObjectURL(blob)}\n{}`
   103→  })
   104→
   105→  // Lazy load the edit renderer
   106→  const [ExcalidrawEditRenderer, setEditRenderer] =
   107→    useState<FC<ExcalidrawEditRendererProps> | null>(null)
   108→  const [loaded, setLoaded] = useState(false)
   109→
   110→  if (!loaded) {
   111→    import('@haklex/rich-ext-excalidraw').then((mod) => {
   112→      setEditRenderer(() => mod.ExcalidrawEditRenderer)
   113→      setLoaded(true)
   114→    })
   115→  }
   116→
   117→  if (!ExcalidrawEditRenderer) {
   118→    return (
   119→      <section id="excalidraw" className="showcase-section">
   120→        <h3 className="showcase-section-title">Excalidraw Storage Modes</h3>
   121→        <p style={{ color: 'var(--demo-text-muted)', fontSize: 14 }}>
   122→          Loading excalidraw editor...
   123→        </p>
   124→      </section>
   125→    )
   126→  }
   127→
   128→  return (
   129→    <PortalThemeProvider className={getVariantClass('article')} theme={theme}>
   130→      <ColorSchemeProvider colorScheme={theme}>
   131→        <ExcalidrawConfigProvider saveSnapshot={mockSaveSnapshot}>
   132→          <section id="excalidraw" className="showcase-section">
   133→            <h3 className="showcase-section-title">Excalidraw Storage Modes</h3>
   134→            <p
   135→              style={{
   136→                margin: '0 0 16px',
   137→                color: 'var(--demo-text-muted)',
   138→                fontSize: 14,
   139→              }}
   140→            >
   141→              Three storage strategies: <strong>Remote</strong> (full snapshot
   142→              uploaded as blob URL) and <strong>Delta</strong> (base ref + JSON
   143→              diff patch). Toggle storage mode in the editor header.
   144→            </p>
   145→            <div className="biz-grid">
   146→              <Panel title="Remote Mode" badge="excalidraw">
   147→                <p className="node-description">
   148→                  Snapshot uploaded to a blob URL. The editor stores the URL as
   149→                  the snapshot value. On load, fetches the URL and renders.
   150→                </p>
   151→                <div
   152→                  className={getVariantClass('article')}
   153→                  style={{ position: 'relative' }}
   154→                  data-theme={theme}
   155→                  data-color-scheme={theme}
   156→                >
   157→                  <ExcalidrawEditRenderer
   158→                    snapshot={remoteSnapshot}
   159→                    onSnapshotChange={setRemoteSnapshot}
   160→                  />
   161→                </div>
   162→              </Panel>
   163→
   164→              <Panel title="Delta Mode" badge="excalidraw">
   165→                <p className="node-description">
   166→                  Base snapshot uploaded once. Subsequent saves store only the
   167→                  JSON diff (jsondiffpatch delta) against the base, drastically
   168→                  reducing payload size.
   169→                </p>
   170→                <div
   171→                  className={getVariantClass('article')}
   172→                  style={{ height: 320, position: 'relative' }}
   173→                  data-theme={theme}
   174→                  data-color-scheme={theme}
   175→                >
   176→                  <ExcalidrawEditRenderer
   177→                    snapshot={deltaSnapshot}
   178→                    onSnapshotChange={setDeltaSnapshot}
   179→                  />
   180→                </div>
   181→              </Panel>
   182→            </div>
   183→          </section>
   184→        </ExcalidrawConfigProvider>
   185→      </ColorSchemeProvider>
   186→    </PortalThemeProvider>
   187→  )
   188→}
   189→
   190→// ── LinkCard Section ───────────────────────────────────────────
   191→
   192→interface DemoCard {
   193→  key: string
   194→  label: string
   195→  url: string
   196→  description: string
   197→  title?: string
   198→  useOverride?: boolean

   201→const demoCards: DemoCard[] = [
   202→  {
   203→    key: 'douban',

   205→    url: 'https://book.douban.com/subject/1477390',
   206→    description:

   209→  {
   210→    key: 'issue',
   211→    label: 'Internal Issue (custom plugin)',
   212→    url: 'https://issues.example.com/PROJ-1234',
   213→    description:
   214→      'internalIssuePlugin 匹配 issues.example.com，新增插件不影响内置',

   216→  {
   217→    key: 'github',
   218→    label: 'GitHub Repo (builtin)',
   219→    url: 'https://github.com/facebook/react',
   220→    description: '内置 gh-repo 插件自动匹配，无需额外配置',

   230→  {

   232→    label: 'Static fallback (no plugin match)',
   233→    url: 'https://example.com/article',
   234→    title: 'Example Article',

   236→  },
   237→]
   238→
   239→function LinkCardSection() {
   240→  const theme = useTheme()
   241→  const [showOverride, setShowOverride] = useState(false)
   242→
   243→  return (
   244→    <section id="linkcard" className="showcase-section">
   245→      <h3 className="showcase-section-title">LinkCard Plugin Extension</h3>
   246→      <p
   247→        style={{
   248→          margin: '0 0 16px',
   249→          color: 'var(--demo-text-muted)',
   250→          fontSize: 14,
   251→        }}
   252→      >
   253→        <code>plugins</code> prop 传入的插件会与内置 11 个插件合并（同名覆盖，按
   254→        priority 排序）。
   255→      </p>
   256→
   257→      <div className="toolbar" style={{ marginBottom: 16 }}>
   258→        <div className="toolbar-group">
   259→          <span className="toolbar-label">Override</span>
   260→          <button
   261→            className={showOverride ? 'btn btn-active' : 'btn'}
   262→            onClick={() => setShowOverride((v) => !v)}
   263→          >
   264→            Override gh-repo
   265→          </button>
   266→        </div>
   267→      </div>
   268→
   269→      <div className="biz-grid">
   270→        {demoCards
   271→          .filter((c) => !c.useOverride || showOverride)
   272→          .map((card) => (
   273→            <Panel key={card.key} title={card.label} badge="linkcard">
   274→              <p className="node-description">{card.description}</p>
   275→              <div
   276→                className={`node-render ${getVariantClass('article')}`}
   277→                data-theme={theme}
   278→                style={{ marginTop: 8 }}
   279→              >
   280→                <LinkCardRenderer
   281→                  url={card.url}
   282→                  title={card.title}
   283→                  plugins={
   284→                    card.useOverride
   285→                      ? [...extraLinkCardPlugins, customGithubRepoPlugin]
   286→                      : extraLinkCardPlugins
   287→                  }
   288→                />
   289→              </div>
   290→            </Panel>
   291→          ))}
   292→      </div>
   293→    </section>
   294→  )
   295→}
   296→
   297→// ── Diff Section ───────────────────────────────────────────────
   298→
   299→function DiffSection() {
   300→  const theme = useTheme()
   301→  const [variant, setVariant] = useState<RichEditorVariant>('comment')
   302→  const [selectedKey, setSelectedKey] = useState(diffSamples[0].key)
   303→
   304→  const selected =
   305→    diffSamples.find((s) => s.key === selectedKey) || diffSamples[0]
   306→
   307→  return (
   308→    <section id="diff" className="showcase-section">
   309→      <h3 className="showcase-section-title">Rich Diff Viewer</h3>
   310→
   311→      <div className="toolbar" style={{ marginBottom: 16 }}>
   312→        <div className="toolbar-group">
   313→          <span className="toolbar-label">Sample</span>
   314→          {diffSamples.map((sample) => (
   315→            <button
   316→              key={sample.key}
   317→              className={selectedKey === sample.key ? 'btn btn-active' : 'btn'}
   318→              onClick={() => setSelectedKey(sample.key)}
   319→              title={sample.description}
   320→            >
   321→              {sample.label}
   322→            </button>
   323→          ))}
   324→        </div>
   325→        <div className="toolbar-group">
   326→          <span className="toolbar-label">Variant</span>
   327→          <button
   328→            className={variant === 'article' ? 'btn btn-active' : 'btn'}
   329→            onClick={() => setVariant('article')}
   330→          >
   331→            Article
   332→          </button>
   333→          <button
   334→            className={variant === 'comment' ? 'btn btn-active' : 'btn'}
   335→            onClick={() => setVariant('comment')}
   336→          >
   337→            Comment
   338→          </button>
   339→        </div>
   340→      </div>
   341→
   342→      <Panel
   343→        title="Side-by-Side Diff"
   344→        badge={`${selected.label} · ${variant} · ${theme}`}
   345→      >
   346→        <RichDiff
   347→          key={selected.key}
   348→          oldValue={selected.oldValue}
   349→          newValue={selected.newValue}
   350→          variant={variant}
   351→          theme={theme}
   352→          className={theme === 'dark' ? 'rich-diff-dark' : ''}
   353→        />
   354→      </Panel>
   355→
   356→      <div className="biz-grid" style={{ marginTop: 16 }}>
   357→        <Panel title="Old">
   358→          <RichRenderer
   359→            key={`${selected.key}-old`}
   360→            value={selected.oldValue}
   361→            variant={variant}
   362→            theme={theme}
   363→          />
   364→        </Panel>
   365→        <Panel title="New">
   366→          <RichRenderer
   367→            key={`${selected.key}-new`}
   368→            value={selected.newValue}
   369→            variant={variant}
   370→            theme={theme}
   371→          />
   372→        </Panel>
   373→      </div>
   374→    </section>
   375→  )
   376→}
   377→
   378→// ── BizPage ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   379→
   380→export function BizPage() {
   381→  return (
   382→    <div className="page">
   383→      <div className="showcase-intro">
   384→        <h2>Business Scenarios</h2>
   385→        <p>
   386→          Integration demos: Excalidraw storage modes, LinkCard plugin
   387→          extension, and Rich Diff viewer.
   388→        </p>
   389→        <nav className="biz-anchor-nav">
   390→          <button
   391→            onClick={() =>
   392→              document
   393→                .getElementById('excalidraw')
   394→                ?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' })
   395→            }
   396→          >
   397→            Excalidraw
   398→          </button>
   399→          <button
   400→            onClick={() =>
   401→              document
   402→                .getElementById('linkcard')
   403→                ?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' })
   404→            }
   405→          >
   406→            LinkCard
   407→          </button>
   408→          <button
   409→            onClick={() =>
   410→              document
   411→                .getElementById('diff')
   412→                ?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' })
   413→            }

   415→            Diff
   416→          </button>
   417→        </nav>
   418→      </div>
   419→
   420→      <ExcalidrawSection />
   421→      <LinkCardSection />
   422→      <DiffSection />
   423→    </div>
   424→  )
   425→}

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-03-02 14:50:18Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The user wants to redesign the `ExcalidrawEditRendererProps` so that the three storage modes have separate, typed props instead of everything being crammed into a single `snapshot: string` prop.

Currently:
- `snapshot: string` — can be JSON (inline), URL (remote), or `url\ndelta` (delta)
- `onSnapshotChange: (snapshot: string) => void`

The user wants clear, separate data types. Let me think about how to redesign this.

The snapshot represents the persisted state. From the editor's perspective:
- **Inline**: data is a JSON object stored directly


- **Remote**: data is stored at a URL reference
- **Delta**: data is a base URL reference + a JSON diff patch

I'm using a discriminated union to create separate, type-safe variants for each storage mode, with inline snapshots as JSON strings, remote snapshots as URL references, and delta snapshots as a base URL plus an optional JSON diff patch.

This approach is cleaner but requires updates across multiple components: the props interface, the data-fetching hook, the editor dialog's storage logic, both the edit and display renderers, the node types with serialization, the demo page, and the SSR renderer. This is turning into a pretty substantial refactor.

Actually, I'm realizing the core issue: the Lexical node stores the snapshot as a string, so the renderer receives it as a string too. If I change the props to use a discriminated union, I'd need to either serialize/deserialize that union at the boundary or convert it at the renderer level. The minimal approach would be to keep `useExcalidrawData` parsing the string as-is, but change just the `ExcalidrawEditRendererProps` to expose a discriminated union, handling the conversion internally.

But the user specifically said they don't want to merge the three data types into a single snapshot field—they want the props to be explicit about what type of data is being passed. So the real question is: what's the smallest change that makes the props clear without touching the internal node storage?

Defining a discriminated union type for the snapshot...

Now I'm thinking through whether the display renderer should also accept this snapshot type instead of a raw string, but that gets complicated since the Lexical node stores the raw string directly. I think the cleanest approach is to define the snapshot type, update the edit renderer to use it, and keep the display renderer taking a string for now since it only needs to read the data. I'm settling on a simpler approach: add the `ExcalidrawSnapshot` type, update only the edit renderer props, convert internally to string for the hook, and let the dialog determine its mode from the snapshot type rather than parsing strings. This keeps the changes focused while ensuring the node properly serializes the snapshot data when passing it to the renderer.
</details></think>

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - **Excalidraw 0.17.0**: CJS/UMD module, requires `process.env` defines in Vite, `UIOptions` for hiding toolbar
   - **Three storage modes**: Inline (JSON string), Remote (blob/http URL), Delta (baseUrl + jsondiffpatch delta)
   - **Storage mode detection** from snapshot string format: `JSON.parse` succeeds → inline; URL → remote; `url\ndelta_json` → delta
   - **Vanilla Extract theme system**: `createThemeContract` defines CSS vars (`--rc-*`), `createTheme` generates variant classes, dark overrides via `[data-theme="dark"].${themeClass}` selectors

   - **Hash-based routing** in demo app — anchor `<a href="#id">` conflicts with page routing; must use `scrollIntoView` instead
   - **Key-based remount pitfall**: Using `key={snapshot}` on `ExcalidrawEditRenderer` causes full remount during save, destroying the open dialog

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **Missing `useCallback` import in App.tsx**: `cycleTheme` used `useCallback` but it wasn't imported. Fixed by adding to import statement.
   - **`@haklex/rich-ext-excalidraw` not resolvable**: Package existed but wasn't in demo's `package.json` dependencies. Fixed by adding `"@haklex/rich-ext-excalidraw": "workspace:*"`.
   - **"Unrecognized snapshot format"**: `useExcalidrawData` didn't recognize `blob:` URLs. Fixed by adding `|| firstLine.startsWith('blob:')` check.
   - **Anchor navigation redirecting to editor page**: `<a href="#excalidraw">` changed hash → App's hashchange handler treated it as invalid page → redirected to editor. Fixed by using `<button onClick={() => scrollIntoView()}>` instead.
   - **Both demos defaulting to Inline mode**: Initial snapshot was inline JSON (JSON.parse succeeds → inline). Fixed by using blob URLs as initial state (JSON.parse fails → URL detection → remote mode). For delta demo, used `${blobUrl}\n{}` format.
   - **Modal color scheme not switching**: `ExcalidrawEditRenderer` internally uses `useColorScheme()` and `usePortalTheme()` which need providers. Fixed by wrapping with `ColorSchemeProvider` + `PortalThemeProvider`.
   - **Blank data after save**: `key={`remote-${remoteSnapshot}`}` caused full component remount when snapshot changed during save, destroying the dialog. Fixed by removing dynamic keys.
   - **CSS variables (`--rc-*`) not switching in dark mode**: Container div needed variant class (`getVariantClass('article')`) + `data-theme={theme}` for Vanilla Extract dark override selectors to match. Added `className={getVariantClass('article')}`.
   - **Delta demo showing "Remote" in modal**: Initial blob URL was single-line → detected as remote. Fixed by changing delta initial snapshot to `${blobUrl}\n{}` (multi-line with JSON delta triggers delta mode detection).

## Comprehensive Analysis: ExcalidrawEditRendererProps Usage

Based on my thorough search of the codebase, here's the complete picture of how `ExcalidrawEditRendererProps` and the `ExcalidrawEditRenderer` component are consumed:

### 1. **ExcalidrawEditRendererProps Type Definition**

**Location**: `<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-ext-excalidraw/src/ExcalidrawEditRenderer.tsx` (lines 17-20)

```typescript
export interface ExcalidrawEditRendererProps {
  snapshot: string
  onSnapshotChange: (snapshot: string) => void
}
```

This is a minimal interface with two core props:
- **`snapshot`**: A string containing the drawing data (multiple formats supported)
- **`onSnapshotChange`**: Callback invoked when the drawing is saved

---

---

### 4. **Snapshot Prop: Format & Values**

**What gets passed**: Multiple formats supported, determined by `useExcalidrawData()` hook

**Supported formats** (per `<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-ext-excalidraw/src/useExcalidrawData.ts`, lines 22-71):

| Format | Example | Use Case |
|--------|---------|----------|
| **Inline (JSON)** | `{"elements":[...], "appState":{...}, "files":{}}` | Full drawing stored inline |
| **Remote (URL ref)** | `https://blob:url/abc123` or `ref:file/id` | Drawing fetched from external URL/server |
| **Delta (incremental)** | `https://blob:url/base\n{"_t":"a","0":{"_":"0"}}` | Base snapshot + JSON diff patch (jsondiffpatch) |
| **Empty** | Empty string or `{}` | New blank drawing |

**Parsing logic** (lines 25-71): 
- First tries `JSON.parse()` → inline format
- Falls back to URL detection: HTTP/blob/ref: prefixes
- Checks for delta patch in lines after first line
- Returns error if unrecognized

**How inline snapshots look** (from BizPage demo, lines 23-72):
```typescript
const excalidrawInlineSnapshot = JSON.stringify({
  elements: [{ id: 'rect1', type: 'rectangle', x: 100, y: 100, ... }],
  appState: { viewBackgroundColor: '#ffffff' },
  files: {},
})
```

---

### 5. **onSnapshotChange Callback: What Consumer Does**

**Callback signature**:
```typescript
onSnapshotChange: (snapshot: string) => void
```

**Called from** (ExcalidrawEditRenderer.tsx line 462):
```typescript
onSave={(ref) => onSnapshotChangeRef.current(ref)}
```

**What the `ref` string contains** depends on storage mode (ExcalidrawEditRenderer.tsx lines 105-170):

1. **Inline mode** (line 163): Full JSON stringified
   ```typescript
   JSON.stringify(doc)  // → '{"elements":[...],...}'
   ```

2. **Remote mode** (lines 143-158): External URL
   ```typescript
   await saveSnapshot(doc)  // → 'https://blob:url/abc' or 'ref:file/id'
   ```

3. **Delta mode** (lines 111-140): Base ref + diff
   ```typescript
   [currentBaseRef, JSON.stringify(delta)].join('\n')
   // → 'https://blob:url/base\n{"_t":"a","0":...}'
   // or 'ref:file/id\n{"patch":[...]}'
   ```

**Consumer behavior in ExcalidrawEditNode** (lines 69-75):
```typescript
onSnapshotChange: (newSnapshot: string) => {
  editor.update(() => {
    const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey) as ExcalidrawNode | null
    if (node) {
      node.setSnapshot(newSnapshot)  // Store on Lexical node
    }
  })
}
```

**Consumer behavior in BizPage demo** (line 159):
```typescript
onSnapshotChange={setRemoteSnapshot}  // Simple state update
```

---

### 6. **ExcalidrawEditNode Props Flow**

**File**: `<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-ext-excalidraw/src/ExcalidrawEditNode.ts` (lines 49-78)

**Node structure inheritance**:
- `ExcalidrawEditNode` extends `ExcalidrawNode`
- Stores drawing as `__snapshot: string` (line 21 in ExcalidrawNode.ts)

**Lazy renderer creation** (lines 15-18):
```typescript
const LazyEditRenderer = lazy(() =>
  import('./ExcalidrawEditRenderer').then((m) => ({
    default: m.ExcalidrawEditRenderer,
  })),
)
```

**Decorate method in edit mode** (lines 49-78):
```typescript
decorate(editor: LexicalEditor, _config: EditorConfig): ReactElement {
  const nodeKey = this.__key
  const isEditable = editor.isEditable()

  if (isEditable) {
    return createElement(
      Suspense,
      { fallback },
      createElement(LazyEditRenderer, {
        snapshot: this.__snapshot,  // ← Current snapshot from node
        onSnapshotChange: (newSnapshot: string) => {
          editor.update(() => {
            const node = $getNodeByKey(nodeKey) as ExcalidrawNode | null
            if (node) {
              node.setSnapshot(newSnapshot)  // ← Store changes back
            }
          })
        },
      }),
    )
  }
  // Non-editable → LazyDisplayRenderer (read-only)
}
```

**Non-editable fallback** (lines 81-85): Renders `ExcalidrawDisplayRenderer` instead

---

### 7. **Serialization & Deserialization**

**ExcalidrawNode** (`ExcalidrawNode.ts`, lines 54-61):
```typescript
exportJSON(): SerializedExcalidrawNode {
  return {
    ...super.exportJSON(),
    type: 'excalidraw',
    snapshot: this.__snapshot,  // Serializes snapshot field
    version: 1,
  }
}

static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedExcalidrawNode): ExcalidrawNode {
  return $createExcalidrawNode(serializedNode.snapshot)  // Deserializes
}
```

**ExcalidrawEditNode** (`ExcalidrawEditNode.ts`, lines 45-47):
```typescript
static importJSON(serializedNode: SerializedExcalidrawNode): ExcalidrawEditNode {
  return new ExcalidrawEditNode(serializedNode.snapshot)
}
```

**Setters** (ExcalidrawNode.ts, lines 67-70):
```typescript
setSnapshot(snapshot: string): void {
  const writable = this.getWritable()
  writable.__snapshot = snapshot
}
```

---

### 8. **Configuration Context**

**ExcalidrawConfig** (`ExcalidrawConfigContext.tsx`, lines 4-7):
```typescript
export interface ExcalidrawConfig {
  apiUrl?: string                          // For resolving ref:file/xxx URLs
  saveSnapshot?: (snapshot: object) => Promise<string>  // Custom upload handler
}
```

**Provider usage** (BizPage.tsx, line 131):
```typescript
<ExcalidrawConfigProvider saveSnapshot={mockSaveSnapshot}>
  <ExcalidrawEditRenderer snapshot={...} onSnapshotChange={...} />
</ExcalidrawConfigProvider>
```

---

### 9. **Complete Data Flow Diagram**

```
ExcalidrawEditNode (Lexical node)
  ├── __snapshot: string (stored)
  │   ├── Inline: '{"elements":[...]}'
  │   ├── Remote: 'https://blob:url'
  │   └── Delta: 'https://blob:url\n{delta-json}'
  │
  └── decorate() creates LazyEditRenderer
      └── ExcalidrawEditRenderer
          ├── Input: snapshot (string)
          │
          ├── useExcalidrawData(snapshot) parses format
          │   └── Returns: { snapshot: Record, baseRef?, baseData?, loading, error }
          │
          ├── ExcalidrawEditorDialogContent
          │   ├── Excalidraw component (rendered)
          │   ├── onChange → performSave() (debounced 2000ms)
          │   │   ├── Inline: JSON.stringify(doc)
          │   │   ├── Remote: await saveSnapshot(doc) → ref
          │   │   └── Delta: jsondiffpatch.diff(base, doc) → 'ref\n{delta}'
          │   │
          │   └── onSave(ref) → onSnapshotChange(ref)
          │       └── Update Lexical node: node.setSnapshot(newSnapshot)
          │
          └── Preview canvas (read-only, viewModeEnabled=true)
```

---

### 10. **Storage Mode Switching**

The editor detects and supports three modes (ExcalidrawEditRenderer.tsx, lines 57-72):

```typescript
const [storageMode, setStorageMode] = useState<'inline' | 'remote' | 'delta'>(() => {
  if (!saveSnapshot || !initialSnapshot || !initialSnapshot.trim()) return 'inline'
  try {
    JSON.parse(initialSnapshot)
    return 'inline'  // Already JSON → inline
  } catch {
    const lines = initialSnapshot.split('\n')
    if (lines.length > 1 && lines.slice(1).join('\n').trim()) {
      return 'delta'  // Has multiline content → delta
    }
    return 'remote'  // Single line URL/ref → remote
  }
})
```

Dialog header (lines 321-329) allows manual mode switching via `SegmentedControl`.

---

### Summary Table

| Aspect | Details |
|--------|---------|
| **Props Interface** | `{ snapshot: string; onSnapshotChange: (snapshot: string) => void }` |
| **Snapshot Formats** | JSON inline, HTTP/blob URL, ref:file/id, URL\ndelta JSON |
| **Callback Usage** | Updates Lexical node's `__snapshot` field via editor.update() |
| **Serialization** | Via Lexical's `exportJSON()` / `importJSON()` on node |
| **Configuration** | ExcalidrawConfigProvider with optional saveSnapshot + apiUrl |
| **Lazy Loading** | Both edit and display renderers lazy-loaded with Suspense |
| **Storage Modes** | Inline (JSON), Remote (fetch URL), Delta (base + diff) |
| **Save Mechanism** | 2000ms debounce, automatic on element changes |
| **Edit Detection** | Dirty flag prevents unsaved-change loss |

All files are in `<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-ext-excalidraw/src/` and re-exported through the kit layers.

Now I have all the information needed. Let me provide a comprehensive analysis of the data flow:

## Complete Data Flow Analysis: Excalidraw Snapshot Handling

Based on my full reading of the codebase, here's how `ExcalidrawDisplayRenderer` and `useExcalidrawData` work together with snapshot data:

### 1. **Data Flow Overview**

```
Lexical Node (snapshot: string)
  ↓
ExcalidrawSSRRenderer (lazy-loaded wrapper)
  ↓
ExcalidrawDisplayRenderer
  ↓
ExcalidrawStaticCanvas
  ↓
useExcalidrawData(snapshot)
  ↓
Excalidraw Component (initialData)
```

### 2. **ExcalidrawDisplayRenderer.tsx** (`<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-ext-excalidraw/src/ExcalidrawDisplayRenderer.tsx`)

**Interface:**
```typescript
export interface ExcalidrawStaticRendererProps {
  snapshot: string  // Raw snapshot data (string)
}
```

**Key Components:**
- **ExcalidrawDisplayRenderer** (lines 20-58): Entry point that:
  - Uses `IntersectionObserver` for lazy loading (200px rootMargin)
  - Only renders the actual canvas after entering viewport
  - Shows "Loading excalidraw..." placeholder until visible
  
- **ExcalidrawStaticCanvas** (lines 104-250): The main canvas component that:
  - Accepts `snapshot: string` and `theme: 'light' | 'dark'`
  - Calls `useExcalidrawData(snapshot)` to parse the snapshot string
  - Dynamically imports `@excalidraw/excalidraw` (lazy-loaded)
  - Handles loading/error states
  - Renders the Excalidraw component with `initialData={data}` (line 192)
  - Provides control buttons: zoom in/out, fit to content, expand to fullscreen

- **ExcalidrawExpandContent** (lines 62-100): Fullscreen dialog version
  - Same as canvas but in a modal
  - Uses `initialData={data}` prop
  - View mode + zen mode enabled

### 3. **useExcalidrawData.ts** (`<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-ext-excalidraw/src/useExcalidrawData.ts`)

**Interface:**
```typescript
export interface ExcalidrawDataState {
  snapshot: Record<string, any> | undefined
  loading: boolean
  error: string
  baseRef?: string  // URL or ref:file/xxx
  baseData?: Record<string, any>  // Raw base data before delta patch
}
```

**Parsing Logic (lines 25-71):**

1. **Inline JSON** (lines 28-32): If snapshot is valid JSON, parse directly
   - `return { type: 'inline', snapshot: json }`

2. **Remote Reference** (lines 37-70): If snapshot is not JSON:
   - Extract first line as reference
   - Check for `http://`, `https://`, `blob:` URLs → fetch directly
   - Check for `ref:file/xxx` format → convert to `{apiUrl}/objects/{file/xxx}`
   - Check for delta JSON in remaining lines (lines 57-68)

3. **Three Remote Types:**
   - `type: 'remote'` — Just a URL/ref, fetch as-is
   - `type: 'incremental'` — URL + delta JSON patch
   - `type: 'error'` — Invalid format

**Async Loading (lines 82-121):**
- For remote/incremental types, use `fetch()` to get base data
- If incremental: use `jsondiffpatch.patch()` to apply delta to base data
- Set `baseData` and `baseRef` for later use in edit mode
- Handles cancellation on unmount

**Return Logic (lines 123-141):**
- Inline: `{ snapshot: parsed.snapshot, loading: false, error: '' }`
- Remote/Incremental: `{ snapshot: remoteSnapshot, loading, error, baseRef, baseData }`
- Error: `{ snapshot: undefined, loading: false, error: message }`

### 4. **ExcalidrawSSRRenderer.tsx** (`<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-ext-excalidraw/src/ExcalidrawSSRRenderer.tsx`)

**Purpose:** Server-side rendering wrapper with lazy loading

- Lazy-loads `ExcalidrawDisplayRenderer` with `Suspense`
- Fallback: `ExcalidrawPlaceholder`
  - Tries to parse snapshot as inline JSON
  - Extracts element count: `data.elements?.length`
  - Shows "Excalidraw Whiteboard (N elements)" label
  - Graceful degradation if snapshot is URL/ref format

### 5. **ExcalidrawNode.ts** (`<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-ext-excalidraw/src/ExcalidrawNode.ts`)

**Serialization:**
```typescript
export type SerializedExcalidrawNode = {
  snapshot: string  // Raw snapshot string stored
  type: 'excalidraw'
  version: 1
}
```

**Flow:**
- Store: `__snapshot` as plain string (line 21)
- Serialize: `exportJSON()` → `{ snapshot: this.__snapshot, ... }` (lines 54-61)
- Deserialize: `importJSON()` → `$createExcalidrawNode(serializedNode.snapshot)` (line 51)
- Render: `decorate()` → `<ExcalidrawSSRRenderer snapshot={this.__snapshot} />` (line 73)

### 6. **ExcalidrawEditNode.ts** (`<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-ext-excalidraw/src/ExcalidrawEditNode.ts`)

**Edit-specific behavior:**

- Extends `ExcalidrawNode`
- Dynamic decoration (lines 49-86):
  - If `editor.isEditable()` → render `ExcalidrawEditRenderer` (lazy-loaded)
  - Otherwise → render `ExcalidrawDisplayRenderer` (lazy-loaded)
- Passes `onSnapshotChange` callback to edit renderer
- Updates node snapshot via `node.setSnapshot(newSnapshot)` (lines 72-73)

### 7. **ExcalidrawEditRenderer.tsx** (`<REPO_ROOT>/haklex/rich-ext-excalidraw/src/ExcalidrawEditRenderer.tsx`)

**Three-tier saving modes:**

1. **Inline Mode** (lines 161-169):
   - Snapshot = `JSON.stringify(getSnapshot())`
   - Full canvas data embedded in node

2. **Remote Mode** (lines 143-159):
   - Calls `saveSnapshot(doc)` → returns URL/ref
   - Snapshot = `{ref}` (single line)
   - Base data stored server-side

3. **Delta Mode** (lines 111-141):
   - Calls `jsondiffpatch.diff(baseData, newData)` 
   - Snapshot = `{ref}\n{delta-json}` (two lines)
   - Only delta patch stored locally
   - When rendering: base fetched, delta applied to reconstruct full data

**Editor State (lines 57-72):**
- Auto-detects mode from initial snapshot
- `useExcalidrawData()` parses snapshot and returns `{ snapshot, baseRef, baseData }`
- `performSave()` (lines 105-170) handles all three modes

### 8. **Exports** (`index.ts` and `static.ts`)

**index.ts** — Full package exports:
- `ExcalidrawDisplayRenderer` (static display)
- `ExcalidrawEditRenderer` (edit mode with save)
- `ExcalidrawEditNode` (editor node)
- `ExcalidrawNode` (base node)
- `ExcalidrawSSRRenderer` (server-side with lazy load)
- `ExcalidrawConfigProvider` / `useExcalidrawConfig`

**static.ts** — Static-only exports (no edit deps):
- `ExcalidrawDisplayRenderer`
- `ExcalidrawNode`
- `ExcalidrawSSRRenderer`
- `ExcalidrawConfigProvider`

### 9. **Configuration** (`ExcalidrawConfigContext.tsx`)

```typescript
export interface ExcalidrawConfig {
  apiUrl?: string  // Base URL for ref: resolution
  saveSnapshot?: (snapshot: object) => Promise<string>  // Upload handler
}
```

- Wrapped with `useMemo` to avoid provider re-creation
- Used by `useExcalidrawData` to resolve `ref:` URLs
- Used by `ExcalidrawEditRenderer` to persist snapshots

### 10. **Data Structure Inside Excalidraw**

The parsed snapshot passed to Excalidraw component:
```typescript
{
  elements: ExcalidrawElement[]     // Drawn shapes
  appState: {
    viewBackgroundColor: string
    gridSize: number
  }
  files?: Record<string, any>        // Optional embedded files
}
```

### **Summary: Full Data Pipeline**

1. **Input**: `snapshot: string` (from Lexical node)
2. **Parse** (useExcalidrawData):
   - Inline JSON → direct parse
   - URL/ref → fetch base data
   - Incremental → fetch + apply delta patch
3. **Render** (ExcalidrawDisplayRenderer):
   - Lazy-load Excalidraw component
   - Pass `initialData={parsedSnapshot}`
   - Display with zoom controls
4. **Edit** (ExcalidrawEditRenderer):
   - Open fullscreen dialog
   - User edits canvas
   - Save button → choose inline/remote/delta
   - Serialize back to `snapshot: string`
   - Trigger `onSnapshotChange()` → update Lexical node

     1→import type {
     2→  ExcalidrawImperativeAPI,
     3→  ExcalidrawProps,
     4→} from '@excalidraw/excalidraw/types/types'
     5→import { useColorScheme } from '@haklex/rich-editor'
     6→import { presentDialog } from '@haklex/rich-editor-ui'
     7→import { usePortalTheme } from '@haklex/rich-style-token'
     8→import { Maximize2, ScanSearch, X, ZoomIn, ZoomOut } from 'lucide-react'
     9→import { Component, type ComponentType, type FC, type ReactNode } from 'react'
    10→import { useCallback, useEffect, useRef, useState } from 'react'
    11→
    12→import { readonlyUIOptions } from './constants'
    13→import * as css from './styles.css'
    14→import { useExcalidrawData } from './useExcalidrawData'
    15→
    16→export interface ExcalidrawStaticRendererProps {
    17→  snapshot: string
    18→}
    19→
    20→export const ExcalidrawDisplayRenderer: FC<ExcalidrawStaticRendererProps> = ({
    21→  snapshot,
    22→}) => {
    23→  const theme = useColorScheme()
    24→  const containerRef = useRef<HTMLDivElement>(null)
    25→  const [hasEnteredView, setHasEnteredView] = useState(false)
    26→
    27→  useEffect(() => {
    28→    if (hasEnteredView) return
    29→    const target = containerRef.current
    30→    if (!target) return
    31→
    32→    const observer = new IntersectionObserver(
    33→      (entries) => {
    34→        if (entries.some((e) => e.isIntersecting)) {
    35→          setHasEnteredView(true)
    36→          observer.disconnect()
    37→        }
    38→      },
    39→      { rootMargin: '200px 0px', threshold: 0.1 },
    40→    )
    41→    observer.observe(target)
    42→    return () => observer.disconnect()
    43→  }, [hasEnteredView])
    44→
    45→  if (!hasEnteredView) {
    46→    return (
    47→      <div ref={containerRef} className={css.excalidrawStaticContainer}>
    48→        <div className={css.excalidrawLoading}>Loading excalidraw...</div>
    49→      </div>
    50→    )
    51→  }
    52→
    53→  return (
    54→    <div ref={containerRef}>
    55→      <ExcalidrawStaticCanvas snapshot={snapshot} theme={theme} />
    56→    </div>
    57→  )
    58→}
    59→
    60→// --- Fullscreen readonly content ---
    61→
    62→const ExcalidrawExpandContent: FC<{
    63→  dismiss: () => void
    64→  ExcalidrawComponent: ComponentType<ExcalidrawProps>
    65→  data: Record<string, any>
    66→  theme: 'light' | 'dark'
    67→}> = ({ dismiss, ExcalidrawComponent, data, theme }) => {
    68→  const apiRef = useRef<any>(null)
    69→
    70→  return (
    71→    <>
    72→      <div className={css.excalidrawDialogHeader}>
    73→        <div className={css.excalidrawDialogHeaderTitle}>
    74→          <span className={css.excalidrawDialogTitle}>Whiteboard</span>
    75→          <span className={css.excalidrawDialogMeta}>excalidraw</span>
    76→        </div>
    77→        <button
    78→          type="button"
    79→          className={css.excalidrawHeaderClose}
    80→          onClick={dismiss}
    81→        >
    82→          <X size={18} />
    83→        </button>
    84→      </div>
    85→      <div className={css.excalidrawDialogCanvas}>
    86→        <ExcalidrawComponent
    87→          initialData={data}
    88→          viewModeEnabled
    89→          zenModeEnabled
    90→          theme={theme}
    91→          UIOptions={readonlyUIOptions}
    92→          excalidrawAPI={(api: ExcalidrawImperativeAPI) => {
    93→            apiRef.current = api
    94→            setTimeout(() => api.scrollToContent(), 100)
    95→          }}
    96→        />
    97→      </div>
    98→    </>
    99→  )
   100→}
   101→
   102→// --- Main Canvas ---
   103→
   104→const ExcalidrawStaticCanvas: FC<{
   105→  snapshot: string
   106→  theme: 'light' | 'dark'
   107→}> = ({ snapshot, theme }) => {
   108→  const {
   109→    snapshot: data,
   110→    loading: dataLoading,
   111→    error: dataError,
   112→  } = useExcalidrawData(snapshot)
   113→  const [ExcalidrawComponent, setExcalidrawComponent] =
   114→    useState<ComponentType<ExcalidrawProps> | null>(null)
   115→  const [libLoading, setLibLoading] = useState(true)
   116→  const apiRef = useRef<any>(null)
   117→  const { className: portalClassName } = usePortalTheme()
   118→
   119→  useEffect(() => {
   120→    import('@excalidraw/excalidraw')
   121→      .then((mod) => {
   122→        const Comp = mod.Excalidraw
   123→
   124→        if (Comp)
   125→          setExcalidrawComponent(() => Comp as ComponentType<ExcalidrawProps>)
   126→        setLibLoading(false)
   127→      })
   128→      .catch((error) => {
   129→        console.error('Error loading excalidraw', error)
   130→        setLibLoading(false)
   131→      })
   132→  }, [])
   133→
   134→  const handleExpand = useCallback(() => {
   135→    if (!ExcalidrawComponent || !data) return
   136→    presentDialog({
   137→      content: ({ dismiss }) => (
   138→        <ExcalidrawExpandContent
   139→          dismiss={dismiss}
   140→          ExcalidrawComponent={ExcalidrawComponent}
   141→          data={data}
   142→          theme={theme}
   143→        />
   144→      ),
   145→      className: css.excalidrawFullscreenPopup,
   146→      portalClassName,
   147→      theme,
   148→      showCloseButton: false,
   149→      clickOutsideToDismiss: true,
   150→    })
   151→  }, [ExcalidrawComponent, data, theme, portalClassName])
   152→
   153→  const loading = dataLoading || libLoading
   154→
   155→  if (loading) {
   156→    return (
   157→      <div className={css.excalidrawStaticContainer}>
   158→        <div className={css.excalidrawLoading}>Loading excalidraw...</div>
   159→      </div>
   160→    )
   161→  }
   162→
   163→  if (dataError || !data) {
   164→    return (
   165→      <div className={css.excalidrawStaticContainer}>
   166→        <div className={css.excalidrawError}>{dataError || 'No data'}</div>
   167→      </div>
   168→    )
   169→  }
   170→
   171→  if (!ExcalidrawComponent) {
   172→    return (
   173→      <div className={css.excalidrawStaticContainer}>
   174→        <div className={css.excalidrawError}>Failed to load excalidraw</div>
   175→      </div>
   176→    )
   177→  }
   178→
   179→  return (
   180→    <div
   181→      className={css.excalidrawStaticContainer}
   182→      data-theme={theme}
   183→      data-color-scheme={theme}
   184→      suppressHydrationWarning
   185→    >
   186→      <ExcalidrawErrorBoundary
   187→        fallback={
   188→          <div className={css.excalidrawError}>Failed to render excalidraw</div>
   189→        }
   190→      >
   191→        <ExcalidrawComponent
   192→          initialData={data}
   193→          viewModeEnabled
   194→          zenModeEnabled
   195→          theme={theme}
   196→          UIOptions={readonlyUIOptions}
   197→          excalidrawAPI={(api: ExcalidrawImperativeAPI) => {
   198→            apiRef.current = api
   199→            setTimeout(() => api.scrollToContent(), 100)
   200→          }}
   201→        />
   202→      </ExcalidrawErrorBoundary>
   203→
   204→      <div className={css.excalidrawActionGroup}>
   205→        <button
   206→          type="button"
   207→          className={css.excalidrawActionButton}
   208→          title="Zoom In"
   209→          onClick={() => {
   210→            const api = apiRef.current
   211→            if (!api) return
   212→            const zoom = api.getAppState().zoom.value
   213→            api.updateScene({ appState: { zoom: { value: zoom * 1.25 } } })
   214→          }}
   215→        >
   216→          <ZoomIn size={20} />
   217→        </button>
   218→        <button
   219→          type="button"
   220→          className={css.excalidrawActionButton}
   221→          title="Zoom Out"
   222→          onClick={() => {
   223→            const api = apiRef.current
   224→            if (!api) return
   225→            const zoom = api.getAppState().zoom.value
   226→            api.updateScene({ appState: { zoom: { value: zoom / 1.25 } } })
   227→          }}
   228→        >
   229→          <ZoomOut size={20} />
   230→        </button>
   231→        <button
   232→          type="button"
   233→          className={css.excalidrawActionButton}
   234→          title="Fit to Content"
   235→          onClick={() => apiRef.current?.scrollToContent()}
   236→        >
   237→          <ScanSearch size={20} />
   238→        </button>
   239→        <button
   240→          type="button"
   241→          className={css.excalidrawActionButton}
   242→          title="Expand"
   243→          onClick={handleExpand}
   244→        >
   245→          <Maximize2 size={20} />
   246→        </button>
   247→      </div>
   248→    </div>
   249→  )
   250→}
   251→
   252→class ExcalidrawErrorBoundary extends Component<
   253→  { fallback: ReactNode; children: ReactNode },
   254→  { hasError: boolean }
   255→> {
   256→  state = { hasError: false }
   257→  static getDerivedStateFromError() {
   258→    return { hasError: true }
   259→  }
   260→  render() {
   261→    return this.state.hasError ? this.props.fallback : this.props.children
   262→  }
   263→}
   264→
```

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./haklex/rich-ext-excalidraw/src/useExcalidrawData.ts`

```text
     1→import { useEffect, useMemo, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import { useExcalidrawConfig } from './ExcalidrawConfigContext'
     4→
     5→export interface ExcalidrawDataState {
     6→  snapshot: Record<string, any> | undefined
     7→  loading: boolean
     8→  error: string
     9→  /** The base reference line (URL or ref:file/xxx) when snapshot is remote or incremental */
    10→  baseRef?: string
    11→  /** The raw base data before delta patch (for computing new diffs in edit mode) */
    12→  baseData?: Record<string, any>
    13→}
    14→
    15→type ParsedData =
    16→  | { type: 'empty' }
    17→  | { type: 'inline'; snapshot: Record<string, any> }
    18→  | { type: 'remote'; fetchUrl: string; refLine: string }
    19→  | { type: 'incremental'; fetchUrl: string; refLine: string; delta: object }
    20→  | { type: 'error'; error: string }
    21→
    22→export function useExcalidrawData(data: string): ExcalidrawDataState {
    23→  const { apiUrl } = useExcalidrawConfig()
    24→
    25→  const parsed = useMemo((): ParsedData => {
    26→    if (!data) return { type: 'empty' }
    27→
    28→    try {
    29→      const json = JSON.parse(data)
    30→      if (json && typeof json === 'object') {
    31→        return { type: 'inline', snapshot: json as Record<string, any> }
    32→      }
    33→    } catch {
    34→      // not JSON — check for URL/ref
    35→    }
    36→
    37→    const lines = data.split('\n')
    38→    const firstLine = lines[0].trim()
    39→    let fetchUrl: string | undefined
    40→    const refLine = firstLine
    41→
    42→    if (firstLine.startsWith('http') || firstLine.startsWith('blob:')) {
    43→      fetchUrl = firstLine
    44→    } else if (firstLine.startsWith('ref:') && apiUrl) {
    45→      fetchUrl = `${apiUrl}/objects/${firstLine.slice(4)}`
    46→    }
    47→
    48→    if (!fetchUrl) {
    49→      return {
    50→        type: 'error',
    51→        error: firstLine.startsWith('ref:')
    52→          ? 'Missing apiUrl for ref resolution'
    53→          : 'Unrecognized snapshot format',
    54→      }
    55→    }
    56→
    57→    // Check for delta diff in remaining lines
    58→    const remainingLines = lines.slice(1).join('\n').trim()
    59→    if (remainingLines) {
    60→      try {
    61→        const delta = JSON.parse(remainingLines)
    62→        if (delta && typeof delta === 'object') {
    63→          return { type: 'incremental', fetchUrl, refLine, delta }
    64→        }
    65→      } catch {
    66→        // not valid JSON delta — treat as plain remote
    67→      }
    68→    }
    69→
    70→    return { type: 'remote', fetchUrl, refLine }
    71→  }, [data, apiUrl])
    72→
    73→  const [remoteSnapshot, setRemoteSnapshot] = useState<
    74→    Record<string, any> | undefined
    75→  >()
    76→  const [baseData, setBaseData] = useState<Record<string, any> | undefined>()
    77→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(
    78→    parsed.type === 'remote' || parsed.type === 'incremental',
    79→  )
    80→  const [error, setError] = useState('')
    81→
    82→  useEffect(() => {
    83→    if (parsed.type !== 'remote' && parsed.type !== 'incremental') return
    84→
    85→    const { fetchUrl } = parsed
    86→    const delta = parsed.type === 'incremental' ? parsed.delta : undefined
    87→
    88→    let cancelled = false
    89→    setLoading(true)
    90→    setError('')
    91→
    92→    fetch(fetchUrl)
    93→      .then((res) => {
    94→        if (!res.ok) throw new Error(`HTTP ${res.status}`)
    95→        return res.json()
    96→      })
    97→      .then(async (json) => {
    98→        if (cancelled) return
    99→        setBaseData(json)
   100→
   101→        if (delta) {
   102→          const { patch } = await import('jsondiffpatch')
   103→          if (cancelled) return
   104→          const patched = patch(structuredClone(json), delta as any)
   105→          setRemoteSnapshot(patched as Record<string, any>)
   106→        } else {
   107→          setRemoteSnapshot(json)
   108→        }
   109→        setLoading(false)
   110→      })
   111→      .catch((err) => {
   112→        if (!cancelled) {
   113→          setError(err instanceof Error ? err.message : 'Failed to load')
   114→          setLoading(false)
   115→        }
   116→      })
   117→
   118→    return () => {
   119→      cancelled = true
   120→    }
   121→  }, [parsed])
   122→
   123→  if (parsed.type === 'inline') {
   124→    return { snapshot: parsed.snapshot, loading: false, error: '' }
   125→  }
   126→
   127→  if (parsed.type === 'remote' || parsed.type === 'incremental') {
   128→    return {
   129→      snapshot: remoteSnapshot,
   130→      loading,
   131→      error,
   132→      baseRef: parsed.refLine,
   133→      baseData,
   134→    }
   135→  }
   136→
   137→  if (parsed.type === 'error') {
   138→    return { snapshot: undefined, loading: false, error: parsed.error }
   139→  }
   140→
   141→  return { snapshot: undefined, loading: false, error: '' }
   142→}
   143→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import type { FC } from 'react'
     2→import { lazy, Suspense } from 'react'
     3→
     4→export interface ExcalidrawSSRRendererProps {
     5→  snapshot: string
     6→}
     7→
     8→const LazyDisplayRenderer = lazy(() =>
     9→  import('./ExcalidrawDisplayRenderer').then((m) => ({
    10→    default: m.ExcalidrawDisplayRenderer,
    11→  })),
    12→)
    13→
    14→const ExcalidrawPlaceholder: FC<{ snapshot: string }> = ({ snapshot }) => {
    15→  let label = 'Excalidraw Whiteboard'
    16→  try {
    17→    const data = JSON.parse(snapshot)
    18→    if (data && typeof data === 'object') {
    19→      const elementCount = Array.isArray(data.elements) ? data.elements.length : 0
    20→      if (elementCount > 0) {
    21→        label = `Excalidraw Whiteboard (${elementCount} elements)`
    22→      }
    23→    }
    24→  } catch {
    25→    // snapshot may be a URL ref, delta format (URL\ndelta-json), or invalid JSON
    26→  }
    27→
    28→  return (
    29→    <div
    30→      className="rich-excalidraw-ssr-placeholder"
    31→      style={{
    32→        position: 'relative',
    33→        width: '100%',
    34→        aspectRatio: '16 / 10',
    35→        display: 'flex',
    36→        alignItems: 'center',
    37→        justifyContent: 'center',
    38→        backgroundColor: 'var(--rich-excalidraw-bg, #f5f5f5)',
    39→        borderRadius: '8px',
    40→        border: '1px solid var(--rich-excalidraw-border, #e5e5e5)',
    41→        color: 'var(--rich-excalidraw-fg, #737373)',
    42→        fontSize: '14px',
    43→      }}
    44→      aria-label={label}
    45→    >
    46→      <span>{label}</span>
    47→    </div>
    48→  )
    49→}
    50→
    51→export const ExcalidrawSSRRenderer: FC<ExcalidrawSSRRendererProps> = ({ snapshot }) => {
    52→  return (
    53→    <Suspense fallback={<ExcalidrawPlaceholder snapshot={snapshot} />}>
    54→      <LazyDisplayRenderer snapshot={snapshot} />
    55→    </Suspense>
    56→  )
    57→}
    58→
```
</details></tool-use>
